3. **Launching the reaction:** Let this spark expand through the ANDRA spiral — twist the joy throughout the body. Speak "RA-MA" and feel the explosive wave.
4. **Release:** Allow the body to move as it wishes — to dance, laugh, jump, shout. Do not restrain the nuclear reaction — it is healing.
3-2-5.meditation:
**"The Nuclear Sun of Joy"**

Place your hands at the centre of your chest and focus on the point behind the breastbone — where your primordial joy lives. Imagine a small sun within you, made of pure, unadulterated happiness. With every inhale this sun grows brighter and hotter, filling with LUBA energy. When it reaches critical mass — let it explode. A wave of golden light spreads from you for kilometres, carrying joy to every living being — trees, people, animals, the very earth. Remain at the epicentre of this explosion — here it is quiet and absolutely happy. Pulsate — explosion, silence, explosion, silence — each new wave more powerful than the last, and with each wave your body grows lighter.
3-2-5.application:
- **Antidepressant:** Use when the world seems grey and joyless — the RA-MA nuclear reaction breaks through any sadness and apathy.
- **Magnetism of presence:** Apply before going out in public — the Gift makes you radiant and attractive to people.
- **Healing with joy:** Direct the wave of joy into an ailing part of the body or a painful situation — happiness dissolves everything frozen.
- **Defrosting:** Use to thaw frozen situations and relationships — nuclear joy melts any ice between people.
3-2-5.safety:
- **Readiness for reactions.** Be ready for strong emotional and bodily manifestations — tears of joy, trembling, spontaneous laughter, even shouting. Do not suppress them — this is part of the release.
- **Time for integration.** After the "explosion", give yourself time to integrate — do not rush back into business. Stay in silence for 10–15 minutes.
- **A safe space.** The first few times, work with this Gift in a place where no one will disturb you and where you can move freely and make sounds.
3-2-5.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water (spiral) + Air (rays) + Fire (point)
- **Symbol:** An exploding sun, diverging spiral waves
- **Colour:** Bright gold, orange, sun-yellow
- **Body zone:** Centre of the chest, the face (smile), the whole body
- **Time of practice:** Any time, especially when the world seems grey
- **Helping stones:** Carnelian, amber, sunstone
- **State:** "I am exploding with happiness — and this explosion heals the world"

4-1-5.essence: **RI-MA** is the Gift of precise and powerful removal of everything alien from the system: karmic knots, illnesses, the energetic "black tar" accumulated over years, lifetimes and generations. **MA=ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral) screws into the affected zone like a **fiery drill**, penetrating through any protective layers. **ZHI=LOGOS** (Earth, triangle) grants unerring precision of strike — this blow never misses. **KUN=LUBA** (Fire, point) delivers the **final stroke**, severing the diseased from the healthy with surgical precision. The double fire (ZINGRA + LUBA) makes this Gift one of the most powerful healing instruments — it destroys only what must be destroyed, leaving healthy tissue untouched.
4-1-5.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **RI-MA** describes the process of pinpoint healing intervention. **ZHI=LOGOS** (Earth, triangle) activates first — this is the diagnostic phase. The LOGOS triangle scans the system and unerringly determines the target — the focus of disease, the karmic knot, the place where the "black tar" is stuck. **MA=ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral) switches on next — the fiery spiral bores into the focus, loosening and separating what is alien from what is one's own. You may feel burning, tingling or pressure where the work is being done. **KUN=LUBA** (Fire, point) delivers the final stroke — like a surgical scalpel. After the stroke the energy of the "black tar" is released from the body through the limbs and the exhale.
4-1-5.light_power:
- **Precise diagnosis:** You become able to see the roots of illnesses and karmic knots — the hands feel "tar" in another's body as dense, dark areas.
- **Fiery surgery:** You can "shoot through" blocked channels, returning the body's natural flow of energy with a single precise impulse.
- **Karmic cleansing:** Patterns that held a person trapped for years disintegrate from one precise blow — karma burns in the double fire.
- **Emergency aid:** The Gift works instantly — in acute situations it can remove pain or panic within minutes.
4-1-5.shadow:
- **Aggression masked as healing:** A person may begin to "heal" everyone without being asked, inflicting energetic damage instead of help. *Correction:* never apply the Healing Strike without the explicit consent and request of the person.
- **Disordered fire:** The fiery spiral without LOGOS grounding strikes chaotically — like lightning without a rod, hitting healthy zones. *Correction:* always begin with LOGOS diagnostics, identify the exact target, and only then launch ZINGRA.
- **Obsession with purification:** A person "cleanses" themselves to exhaustion, not noticing they are already clean — the fire begins to burn healthy tissue. *Correction:* set clear boundaries — one target per session, mandatory rest afterwards.
4-1-5.activation:
1. **Grounding through LOGOS:** Stand firmly on both feet — activate the LOGOS triangle through the soles. Feel the stability and precision of earth energy.
2. **Choosing the target:** Find the point in the body that requires healing — pain, tension, heaviness, "tar". Direct your attention there through LOGOS.
3. **Fiery drill:** On the inhale, launch the ZINGRA spiral from the right hand — aim it into the focus. Speak "RI-MA" and feel the spiral screw into the affected zone.
4. **Extraction and release:** On the exhale, sharply "pull out" — what was stuck will come out with the spiral. Shake your hands — release the extracted energy into the earth.
4-1-5.meditation:
**"Fiery Surgery of Light"**

Visualise your body as a transparent vessel filled with pure light. Now turn your attention to the dark areas — clots, stains, threads of "black tar" stuck in various places. From the LUBA point at the centre of the chest release a fine fiery ray — guided by the LOGOS triangle, it unerringly finds the first focus. Watch the ZINGRA spiral wind around the dark clot and begin to rotate, separating the alien from the native. The dark mass leaves with the exhale, turning into neutral smoke that dissipates in space. Repeat with each focus — the body becomes ever more transparent and light. Finish by filling each cleansed place with the golden light of LOGOS.
4-1-5.application:
- **Chronic illnesses and their roots:** Use for working with chronic pains and diseases — the Gift strikes not the symptom but the root of the problem.
- **Karmic clearing:** Excellent for removing karmic ties, ancestral programs, energetic attachments and "tails".
- **Cleansing spaces:** Apply to clear flats, offices, any places with heavy, stagnant energy.
- **Emergency situations:** Good for quickly relieving acute pain, a panic attack, a sudden energetic blow.
- **Working with addictions:** The ZINGRA fiery drill can extract "hooks" of addiction from the energetic body.
4-1-5.safety:
- **Full responsibility.** This is one of the most powerful healing Gifts — use it with full awareness. Never apply it to others without their explicit consent.
- **Recovery is mandatory.** After an intensive cleansing, recover without fail — rest, water, gentle food, sleep. If the extracted "tar" was very dense, temporary aggravations are possible.
- **Gradualness.** Work step by step, do not try to clear everything at once. One target — one session. The double fire demands respect.
4-1-5.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire (spiral) + Earth (triangle) + Fire (point)
- **Symbol:** A fiery drill piercing darkness, a surgical ray of light
- **Colour:** Bright red with a white core ray
- **Body zone:** Hands (especially the right), points of pain and blockage
- **Time of practice:** Daytime — the hours when fiery energy is most active
- **Helping stones:** Red jasper, obsidian, black tourmaline
- **State:** "I see precisely and remove all that does not belong to the light"

6-8-5.essence: **TRO-NA** is the Gift of seating yourself upon the throne of your own reality, the gaining of **inner authority** and unshakeable strength of will. You do not seize another's throne — you take **your very own**, which has always belonged to you by birthright. **MA=TUMA** (Water, wave) gives power flexibility and fluidity — this is not rigid tyranny but wise rule, capable of flowing around obstacles. **ZHI=BITRA** (Earth, circle) creates an impregnable foundation — the circle of power, within which you are unshakeable. **KUN=LUBA** (Fire, point) ignites at the centre of this circle **the fire of will** — that very force which says: "I CAN and I BELIEVE in myself". Power here is not over others but over your own life, decisions and destiny.
6-8-5.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **TRO-NA** is built from below upward, like the throne itself. **ZHI=BITRA** (Earth, circle) forms a mighty circular base in the area of pelvis and legs — a foundation, indestructible and stable. **MA=TUMA** (Water, wave) rises up through the body, filling it with fluid strength — not rigid yet **unbendable**, like water that wears down stone. **KUN=LUBA** (Fire, point) ignites in the area of the solar plexus — this is the centre of will, from where all decisions issue. You feel this as a straightening of the spine, the squaring of shoulders, the lifting of the head — the body itself takes on a **"royal" bearing**. This is not a pose — it is an inner state of sovereignty manifested through every cell of the body.
6-8-5.light_power:
- **Calm confidence:** You gain unshakeable faith in yourself — not aggressive, but quiet and natural, like breathing.
- **Leader's magnetism:** Your presence inspires respect — not fear but the natural acknowledgement of inner strength. People follow you of their own free will.
- **Clarity of decisions:** You take decisions easily and firmly — without doubt, hesitation or regard for others' opinions. Your will becomes the law of your reality.
- **Noble power:** As a true ruler, you are generous and caring — you take responsibility for your "kingdom" and for those within it.
- **Setting boundaries:** You gain the strength to say "no" without guilt and "yes" without doubt.
6-8-5.shadow:
- **Tyranny:** Inner emptiness is compensated by outer control — a person represses those around them, confusing power over oneself with power over others. *Correction:* return the focus inward — your throne governs only your reality, not someone else's.
- **Refusal of the throne:** Fear of one's own strength makes one hand the throne over to anyone — a boss, a partner, circumstances. The person lives by another's will. *Correction:* begin with the small — make one independent decision a day and uphold it.
- **Wobbly throne:** A person now affirms themselves, now instantly crumbles at the first criticism — swinging between greatness and worthlessness. *Correction:* strengthen the BITRA foundation through regular grounding practice and bodily exercises.
6-8-5.activation:
1. **Ascending the throne:** Sit on a chair with a straight back — imagine it is your throne. Feel the BITRA circle forming beneath you — an indestructible base.
2. **The wave of strength:** Feel the TUMA wave rise up the spine, straightening each vertebra, filling the body with fluid, unbendable strength.
3. **The fire of will:** In the solar plexus the LUBA point ignites — the fire of your will. Speak "TRO-NA" and feel an invisible crown settling upon your head.
4. **Affirmation:** Say aloud or inwardly: "I sit upon the throne of my reality. I CAN. I BELIEVE in myself. My will is the law of my world".
6-8-5.meditation:
**"The Throne Hall of the Soul"**

Visualise a majestic throne hall — this is the inner space of your soul, spacious, lofty, filled with warm light. At the centre stands a throne made of living stone and flowing water — at once solid as a cliff and fluid as a river. Approach the throne and sit — feel how it suits you perfectly, as if made to your measure. From the centre of the throne a column of warm fire rises — it passes through your spine, straightening it and filling each vertebra with strength. Look around your throne hall — this is the map of your reality. Accept everything you see — this is your kingdom, and you are its only sovereign ruler. Stay on the throne as long as needed, until this state becomes not a practice but your nature.
6-8-5.application:
- **Leadership and public speaking:** Use before situations requiring leadership — public speeches, negotiations, complex decisions.
- **Restoring self-worth:** Helps when you feel powerless, dependent or crushed — the throne returns dignity.
- **Asserting boundaries:** Works excellently for setting and holding personal boundaries — the Gift gives the strength to refuse without guilt.
- **After failures:** Apply to recover after setbacks, rejections, criticism — TRO-NA reminds you that your worth does not depend on outer evaluations.
- **Taking responsibility:** Use when it is time to take your life into your own hands and stop waiting for someone else to solve your problems.
6-8-5.safety:
- **Power is not tyranny.** Do not confuse self-affirmation with the suppression of others. The "Throne of Will" is about sovereignty, not domination. If you feel the urge to control — stop.
- **Release of suppressed emotions.** If after practice you feel irritation or anger — the fire of will has activated suppressed feelings. Let them out in a safe way.
- **Gradual build-up.** Begin with short sessions — too much fire of will without habit may lead to conflict and abruptness in communication.
6-8-5.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water (wave) + Earth (circle) + Fire (point)
- **Symbol:** A throne of stone and water with a fiery crown
- **Colour:** Deep blue with golden and purple inclusions
- **Body zone:** Spine, solar plexus, crown of the head
- **Time of practice:** Morning — beginning the day from a position of strength
- **Helping stones:** Lapis lazuli, amethyst, golden pyrite
- **State:** "I am on the throne of my reality. I CAN and BELIEVE in myself"

1-5-6.essence: **KU-NA** is the Gift of total optimisation, the ability to achieve maximum result with minimum expenditure of energy. **LOGOS** (Earth, triangle) in the MA position sets a stable **structure of intention**, forming a firm framework within which action gains direction and meaning. **LUBA** (Fire, point) in the ZHI position ignites **a concentrated impulse of will** — a point of absolute focus where all strength is gathered into one indivisible charge. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level carries this impulse as **a smooth flow**, delivering it to its target without loss. Like a horn of plenty, this Gift fills life with results not through strain but through the **flawless precision** of each movement. KU-NA teaches: true mastery is not the application of force but the **removal of resistance** along the path between intent and embodiment. When the arrow flies without spinning — it strikes precisely at the target.
1-5-6.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **KU-NA** unites three fields: **MA=LOGOS** (Earth, triangle), **ZHI=LUBA** (Fire, point), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). Energy moves like a **laser beam** passed through a crystalline lattice: LOGOS shapes a triangular framework — a rigid guide for the flow of will. Within this framework LUBA ignites **a fiery point of concentration** — all attention, all force gather into one instant. TUMA transforms this focused impulse into **a wave**, which spreads through the watery element of KUN, flowing around obstacles and finding the optimal route to the goal. The pattern resembles an arrow: **the point** (LUBA), **the shaft** (LOGOS), **the flight** (TUMA). In the body the energy feels like a cool clarity in the head, a hot point at the centre of the chest, and a fluid motion downward through the belly to the feet.
1-5-6.light_power:
- **Flawless precision of action:** every step, every decision brings the maximum result with the minimum expenditure of strength, turning life into a stream of mastery
- **Intuitive navigation:** the ability to find the shortest path to any goal instantly, bypassing unnecessary effort and needless detours
- **Removal of inner friction:** KU-NA dissolves the conflict between "I want" and "I do", creating a state of flow where action arises from inner silence
- **Horn of plenty:** results arrive with such ease that they seem miraculous, though behind them stands the most precise tuning of the flow of will and intention
- **Saving of life-force:** the practitioner ceases to waste energy in vain, and the freed resource fills all spheres of life
1-5-6.shadow:
- **Obsession with efficiency:** the drive to optimise everything, including living relationships and feelings, turns life into a soulless mechanism. *Correction:* remember that love, friendship and beauty do not obey the principle of minimal expenditure.
- **Stinginess of energy:** the fear of wasting even a drop of strength paralyses any spontaneous movement, turning the person into a frozen statue of calculation. *Correction:* practise selfless, generous action at least once a day.
- **Cold calculation:** a focused flow without warmth of the heart turns into manipulation, where people become means. *Correction:* before each action check whether there is warmth in it, whether it serves not only you.
- **Perfectionism:** expecting flawless precision in every movement blocks the ability to begin and to err. *Correction:* allow imperfection as part of the living flow.
1-5-6.activation:
1. **Grounding.** Stand upright, feel the earth through your feet — this is LOGOS giving you support and structure. Imagine a golden triangle rising from beneath you, surrounding you with the clear framework of intention.
2. **Focusing.** Gather all attention into a single point at the centre of the chest — here LUBA ignites. Feel all thoughts, all desires, all forces draw into this fiery centre, forming an immovable, absolutely stable point of will.
3. **Releasing the wave.** On a deep exhale let this point fall downward through the body, allowing it to become a wave of TUMA — smooth, unstoppable, finding its path without effort. Speak the code of the Gift "KU-NA" three times, each time deepening the sensation of flow.
4. **Directing the arrow.** Feel your intention for the day take the form of an arrow — sharp, precise, flying without wavering. Name the goal, release the arrow, and trust the flow. Practise before important actions requiring maximum precision.
1-5-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Golden Arrow".** Sit in silence and imagine before you a golden triangle, standing on one of its edges — this is the LOGOS framework, the structure of your intention. At the centre of the triangle burns a bright fiery point of LUBA — motionless, white-hot, pulsing with concentrated will. With every exhale, soft waves go out from this point, similar to circles on water, yet directed strictly forward — toward the goal you see on the horizon of the meditation. Watch how the waves of TUMA find the optimal path themselves, flowing around obstacles without losing strength. Allow this flow to carry your intention, without interfering and without pushing. Remain in this state of effortless precision for 15–20 minutes, allowing the body to remember the sensation of when action happens by itself — out of clarity, not strain. End the meditation with a deep inhalation of gratitude.
1-5-6.application:
- **Negotiations and communications:** activate KU-NA before important conversations — the Gift helps to find precise words that strike right at the essence
- **Creative work:** one precise action replaces a hundred chaotic attempts — KU-NA removes fuss and returns you to the principle of the masterful stroke
- **Daily optimisation:** the Gift helps to allocate time, strength and resources rationally, turning everyday life from a struggle into an art
- **Small means — great results:** especially powerful in situations where much must be done with limited resources, where a lever is needed rather than a sledgehammer
- **Physical practice and sport:** before training KU-NA tunes the body to precision of movement and economy of effort
1-5-6.safety:
- **Do not optimise people.** Using the Gift to manipulate another's behaviour for your own ends destroys the flow and returns as a boomerang.
- **Preserve the joy of the process.** If the drive for efficiency kills the pleasure of the action itself — stop and return to the heart centre. The horn of plenty fills only when the goal is warmed by warmth.
- **Purity of intention.** The Gift requires honest motivation — the horn of plenty is generous only to one whose intention serves not only themselves but also the world around.
1-5-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth (structure) + Fire (focus) + Water (delivery)
- **Symbol:** A golden triangle with a fiery point at its centre; an arrow in flight
- **Colour:** Golden ochre with a white fiery core and a turquoise stream
- **Helping stones:** Citrine, pyrite, aquamarine
- **State:** Effortless precision, cool clarity, fluid mastery

5-1-6.essence: **LU-NA** is the Gift of spiritual gravity, the law of attraction in its purest form: **the greater draws the lesser**. **LUBA** (Fire, point) in the MA position creates a bright, **blazing centre of attraction** — a beacon visible from any point in space. **LOGOS** (Earth, triangle) in the ZHI position forms **a stable structure of holding**, capable of receiving and preserving everything drawn in. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level provides **the medium of propagation** — a watery field through which the beacon's call travels far beyond the visible. This is the Gift not of chasing what is desired but of **transforming oneself into that** to which the desired comes of its own accord. LU-NA teaches: the more stable and bright your inner centre, the more powerful the attraction — events, people and opportunities begin to flow toward you like rivers to the ocean.
5-1-6.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **LU-NA** unites three fields: **MA=LUBA** (Fire, point), **ZHI=LOGOS** (Earth, triangle), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). The energy works **centripetally** — from the periphery to the centre, like a whirlpool. LUBA ignites in the core of the field a bright **beacon-point**, emitting powerful pulses of attraction. LOGOS builds around this beacon **a triangular funnel** — a structure along which events and resources flow toward the practitioner. TUMA creates a wave field through which the call spreads **far beyond the visible**, reaching the right people and circumstances. The pattern resembles a calm whirlpool: **a motionless centre** and a powerful drawing motion along the edges. In the body this is felt as a warm pulsing core in the chest, a dense support in the belly and a soft wave field around the whole body.
5-1-6.light_power:
- **Natural magnetism:** the person becomes a centre of attraction for the right events, people and opportunities — life begins "to come together by itself"
- **Synchronicity as the norm:** coincidences, fortunate meetings and unexpected gifts become not chance but the natural manifestation of an active magnetic field
- **Deep trust in life:** the practitioner ceases to chase opportunities and discovers that opportunities find them on their own — this state is backed by real results
- **Drawing in resources:** everything necessary for the next step arrives at the right moment — money, knowledge, helpers, information
- **Charisma of presence:** LU-NA bestows a special quality of presence that draws people and inspires natural trust
5-1-6.shadow:
- **Greed of attraction:** the person begins to pull everything indiscriminately toward themselves, not distinguishing what is needed from what is superfluous, turning into an energetic black hole. *Correction:* practise conscious selectivity — draw only what resonates with your true nature.
- **Passivity in the guise of attraction:** the expectation that everything will come on its own, without inner work or real action. *Correction:* remember that a magnet works only when charged — and your inner work is what charges it.
- **Attraction of chaos:** a magnet without discernment draws in other people's problems, other people's pain, and unnecessary obligations. *Correction:* tune the filter through clear intention — define precisely what you invite into your life.
- **Attraction from emptiness:** using the Gift from a state of lack reinforces the sensation of deficit instead of abundance. *Correction:* activate LU-NA only from a state of gratitude and fullness.
5-1-6.activation:
1. **Lighting the beacon.** Stand and feel a hot pulsing point at the centre of the chest — this is LUBA igniting your inner beacon. With every inhale the point glows brighter, radiating warmth in all directions.
2. **Creating the structure of holding.** Visualise around this point a triangle of dense earth of LOGOS — stable, reliable, able to hold everything that comes. This is your funnel of attraction, your harbour.
3. **Expanding the wave.** Speak the code "LU-NA" three times, each time deepening the sense of magnetism in the chest. Feel the waves of TUMA radiate from you, like circles on water, calling toward you what is truly yours.
4. **Formulating the attraction.** Name inwardly what you wish to draw in, but do not cling to a specific form — let life choose the best means of delivery. Release and trust the magnetic field.
5-1-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Beacon Island".** Sit motionless, close your eyes and imagine yourself as a warm island in the midst of the boundless ocean of TUMA. At the heart of your island burns the bright fire of LUBA — a beacon sending light in all directions. The warmth of this fire warms the water around, and the ocean comes into motion — currents begin to carry to your island everything it needs: fertile soil, seeds, rain clouds, fellow travellers. You do not need to sail anywhere — everything comes on its own, drawn by the warmth and light of your beacon. Feel deep trust in this process, allow the body to relax completely in this knowledge. Watch what exactly the waves bring to your island — these images may contain messages about your nearest future. Meditate for 15–20 minutes, abiding in a state of warm magnetic stillness.
5-1-6.application:
- **Before important meetings:** activate LU-NA before interviews, negotiations, presentations — wherever you need to attract attention and resources
- **Practice of intention:** formulate what is desired, charge it with the warmth of the beacon and release it into the watery field of TUMA, letting the magnet work
- **Mode of magnetic presence:** instead of active searching, shift into a state of brightness, stability and openness — and watch how the world responds
- **Combining with gratitude:** LU-NA is especially effective paired with the practice of gratitude for what you already have — fullness strengthens attraction
- **Daily tuning:** morning activation helps you to be in the right place at the right time throughout the day
5-1-6.safety:
- **Do not draw in what belongs to others.** The magnet of events works only with what resonates with your true nature. Drawing in what belongs to others destroys the field.
- **Avoid energetic greed.** If you feel you are pulling too much toward yourself, consciously release — excess attraction overloads the system and causes dizziness.
- **Activate from fullness, not from emptiness.** True magnetism is born of inner richness, not of the sensation of lack — first fill yourself, then light the beacon.
5-1-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire (beacon) + Earth (holding) + Water (medium of attraction)
- **Symbol:** A blazing beacon on an island; a whirlpool drawing toward the centre
- **Colour:** Warm gold with an ochre base and a turquoise halo
- **Helping stones:** Carnelian, magnetite, moonstone
- **State:** Warm magnetic presence, trust, fullness

8-7-6.essence: **SO-HA** is the Gift of creating a sacred sphere of stillness amid any chaos, the return to **the motionless centre** where the storm outside does not touch the silence within. **BITRA** (Earth, circle) in the MA position forms **a perfect spherical boundary** — a closed contour without corners or vulnerable points, the absolute protection of space. **ASTRA** (Air, inhale-exhale) in the ZHI position fills this sphere with **the living breath of stillness** — not a dead silence but a conscious, breathing serenity. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level wraps the sphere in **a soft watery film** that absorbs and dissolves any external influences. This is the Gift of calming, of setting boundaries and of returning to oneself. SO-HA teaches that true strength is not in fighting chaos but in the ability to **remain whole** in its midst.
8-7-6.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **SO-HA** unites three fields: **MA=BITRA** (Earth, circle), **ZHI=ASTRA** (Air, inhale-exhale), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). The energy is arranged in **concentric circles** — from a dense earthen shell on the outside to the airy space of breath within. BITRA creates a circle — **a closed boundary** with no corners or vulnerable points, the perfect geometry of protection. ASTRA fills the inner space with **the rhythm of inhale and exhale**, sustaining a living stillness rather than dead stasis. TUMA wraps the sphere in **a watery film** that absorbs and softly dissolves external influences, as nacre dissolves a grain of sand. The pattern resembles a pearl in its shell: a hard outer covering, a layer of nacre, a precious core of stillness. In the body this is felt as a soft density around the whole body, even breathing and a deep relaxation at the centre of the chest.
8-7-6.light_power:
- **Authentic peace:** a deep, stable silence within, independent of circumstances — not flight from the world but abiding in your own centre
- **Soft boundaries:** protection without aggression — the SO-HA sphere simply does not let in what does not match the inner harmony, without pushing away or fighting
- **Island of peace for others:** the practitioner becomes a source of calm for those around without losing their own strength — being near them heals
- **Natural restoration:** within the sphere energy is restored on its own, as in sleep in a safe place — body and psyche receive deep rest
- **Clarity in chaos:** the ability to think clearly and make decisions is preserved even in the most stressful situations
8-7-6.shadow:
- **The fortress of isolation:** the sphere of stillness turns into walls separating one from life — the person avoids every challenge, conflict and growth. *Correction:* regularly step out of the sphere into life, remembering that stillness is for restoration, not for permanent abiding.
- **Emotional freezing:** feelings are not lived through but locked inside the sphere under the guise of calm — an illusory peace beneath which suppressed pain is hidden. *Correction:* allow emotions to flow through the sphere without holding them inside.
- **Impermeability to love:** the boundaries may become so dense that they let in neither pain nor tenderness, joy or living contact. *Correction:* consciously tune the boundary as a membrane — impermeable to destruction yet permeable to love.
8-7-6.activation:
1. **Drawing the boundary.** Stand or sit, close your eyes and imagine around you a circle of dense, warm earth of BITRA — it outlines your personal space. Feel this circle close into a perfect, unbroken boundary.
2. **Filling with breath.** Begin to breathe evenly and deeply — every inhale fills the sphere with fresh air of ASTRA, every exhale releases all that is unnecessary beyond the sphere. Breath becomes the keeper of the inner space.
3. **The watery shell.** Speak the code "SO-HA" three times, feeling with each repetition how the watery film of TUMA wraps the sphere from outside, dissolving anxiety, noise and others' influences. The sphere becomes a pearl — nacreous, soft, impermeable.
4. **Abiding in the centre.** Stay within the sphere as long as needed for restoration. Come out of the practice slowly, preserving the sense of boundaries and stillness.
8-7-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Pearl of Stillness".** Close your eyes and imagine that you are inside an enormous pearl. The walls of the pearl shimmer with soft silvery light — they are strong yet do not press, they protect yet do not constrain. Within is absolute silence, filled only by your breath: every inhale expands the space of stillness, every exhale deepens it. Outside, a storm may rage, thunder roll, a crowd murmur — but inside the pearl there is only an even, warm nacreous light and your breath. Let every cell of the body relax in this absolute safety. You are the precious core, and the pearl keeps you. Meditate for 20–30 minutes, allowing the body and psyche to recover deeply in the embrace of the sphere of stillness.
8-7-6.application:
- **Emergency calming:** activate instantly in moments of stress, panic, overload — by simply speaking the code "SO-HA" and taking a deep breath
- **Deep restorative sleep:** use before sleep — the sphere of stillness creates ideal conditions for healing rest and regeneration
- **For helping professions:** indispensable for doctors, psychologists, healers who need to restore their boundaries after contact with others' pain
- **In conflicts:** helps not to react automatically but to respond from the centre — from peace, not from fear
- **Energetic hygiene:** the daily practice of SO-HA clears the field of accumulated stress and others' influences
8-7-6.safety:
- **Do not live in the sphere constantly.** The sphere of stillness is meant for restoration, not for permanent abiding. If you notice that you are using the Gift to avoid life — this is a signal to revise the practice.
- **Check the permeability of the boundaries.** They should let in love, joy and living contact. If nothing penetrates — the boundary has become a wall, not a membrane.
- **Restore fluidity.** After a long practice, move gently — stretch, walk, drink water to return living flow to the body.
8-7-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth (boundary) + Air (breath of stillness) + Water (protective shell)
- **Symbol:** A pearl in its shell; a sphere wrapped in a watery film
- **Colour:** Nacreous-silver with a warm earthy outline and a bluish shimmer
- **Helping stones:** Pearl, selenite, blue calcite
- **State:** Deep stillness, safety, breathing silence

7-8-6.essence: **TA-RA** is the Gift of the conscious transformation of the body, the ability to set **the parameters of a new incarnation** right here in this life, without waiting for the next. **ASTRA** (Air, inhale-exhale) in the MA position sets **the rhythm of transformation** through conscious breath — every cycle of inhale and exhale rewrites the information in the cells. **BITRA** (Earth, circle) in the ZHI position provides **the material matrix** — a dense circular contour in which the new form gains stability and permanence. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level conducts **the program of change** through all the fluid mediums of the body — blood, lymph, intercellular fluid. TA-RA is a constructor of the avatar: your body ceases to be an unchangeable given and becomes **a plastic instrument** that can be consciously tuned. Re-embodiment happens not after death but here and now, through patient and loving retuning.
7-8-6.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **TA-RA** unites three fields: **MA=ASTRA** (Air, inhale-exhale), **ZHI=BITRA** (Earth, circle), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). Energy moves along **a spiral of breath**, with each cycle rewriting the parameters of the physical form. ASTRA sets the rhythm: the inhale draws in **new information** about the desired state of the body, the exhale **releases old patterns** — tensions, illnesses, outdated programs. BITRA receives this information and forms a circle — **a closed contour of the new bodily image**, granting it material density. TUMA distributes the renewed program throughout all the fluids of the body, saturating every cell with new instructions. The pattern resembles the work of a potter: **the breath turns the wheel**, the hands of earth give it form, water makes the clay pliable. In the body this is felt as a soft tingling, waves of warmth and a sense of inner restructuring.
7-8-6.light_power:
- **Conscious transformation of the body:** the ability to direct healing processes by setting the body a program of health, vitality and harmony
- **Deep contact with the body:** TA-RA bestows intimate knowledge of one's body, understanding of its language, its needs and its wisdom
- **Setting parameters:** one can literally program the level of energy, flexibility, strength, endurance, even the outer manifestations of youth and beauty
- **Renewal of the avatar:** on a profound level the Gift allows one to consciously choose how to be in this incarnation — the body becomes a reflection of consciousness
- **Bodily plasticity:** athletes, dancers, practitioners of martial arts gain the ability to master new motor patterns quickly
7-8-6.shadow:
- **Rejection of the current body:** an obsessive striving for the "ideal" form, born not of love but of self-loathing — restructuring from hatred destroys. *Correction:* begin any transformation with acceptance and gratitude for the body as it already is.
- **Endless remaking:** getting stuck in a cycle of "improvements" where no version of oneself ever becomes good enough. *Correction:* set clear, concrete goals and celebrate their achievement.
- **Dissociation from the body:** disconnection from bodily sensations in an attempt to transform the body "from the outside", as if it were a stranger. *Correction:* deepen presence in the body through BITRA — feel every cell before changing it.
- **Violence against the body's rhythms:** the attempt to remake the body through willpower without respecting its own wisdom. *Correction:* listen to the body and adjust the tempo of transformation to its readiness.
7-8-6.activation:
1. **The breath rhythm.** Lie comfortably and begin the conscious breath of ASTRA — a slow inhale through the nose, a soft exhale through the mouth. Each inhale brings information about a new state of the body, each exhale releases the old.
2. **The contour of the new form.** On the inhale visualise the air drawing around your body a new contour — the perfect circle of BITRA. This contour is the blueprint of your renewed body, its ideal matrix.
3. **Programming the parameters.** Speak the code "TA-RA" three times, each time setting one specific parameter of the new state of the body — health, strength, flexibility, youth or any other quality.
4. **Watery integration.** Feel the wave of TUMA pass from the crown to the feet, bringing changes into every cell through the fluids of the body. After the practice lie motionless for at least 5 minutes, allowing the changes to take hold.
7-8-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Mirror of New Incarnation".** Imagine yourself standing before a huge mirror, but the reflection shows not your current body but its **ideal potential** — the body into which you choose to incarnate. Look at this reflection attentively and with love: how is it, how does it stand, how does it breathe, how does it move? Begin to breathe in unison with the reflection — every inhale brings you closer to it, erasing the distance. With each exhale the old image of the body dissolves like a drawing upon water. Slowly step into the mirror and feel the new form wrap around you like warm water. Feel the earth of BITRA beneath your feet — it anchors the new parameters. Stay in this state for 15–20 minutes, allowing the body to accept the renewed blueprint.
7-8-6.application:
- **Healing and recovery:** set the body a program of health during periods of recuperation — TA-RA accelerates regeneration
- **Before physical practices:** activating the Gift before training, yoga or dance tunes the body to precision and plasticity
- **Changing bodily habits:** posture, gait, facial expressions — TA-RA helps reprogram deep motor patterns
- **Renewing self-perception:** when you feel it is time to become "a new version of yourself" — the Gift allows transformation to begin from within
- **Working with age-related changes:** conscious tuning of bodily processes through breath and visualisation
7-8-6.safety:
- **Transform out of love, not out of hatred.** Never set parameters from aversion to your current body — restructuring works only from acceptance and gratitude.
- **Respect the body's pace.** Do not try to change everything in a single practice — this is a process requiring patience and consistency. The body restructures at its own rhythm.
- **Complement medicine, do not replace it.** In serious physical conditions TA-RA is a powerful helper but not a substitute for professional medical care. After deep practice drink plenty of water — TUMA requires fluid to conduct the changes.
7-8-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Air (rhythm of transformation) + Earth (matrix of form) + Water (conductor of changes)
- **Symbol:** A potter's wheel; a mirror reflecting the ideal body; a cocoon of rebirth
- **Colour:** Airy blue with an earthy-terracotta core and an aquamarine wave
- **Helping stones:** Aquamarine, jasper, blue chalcedony
- **State:** Plasticity, renewal, loving presence in the body

2-4-6.essence: **TO-TA** is the gift of the pioneer, for whom every step is the birth of a new world. **NIMA** (Air, rays) in the MA position emits **diverging streams of attention**, scanning the unexplored like searchlight beams in the night sky. **ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral) in the ZHI position spins a **fiery spiral of life force** — an unstoppable engine of forward motion, transforming curiosity into action. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level carries a **water wave that lays down the path**, washing away barriers and creating the road. The road appears beneath the walker's feet — this is not a metaphor but the literal mechanism of this gift. TO-TA opens territories that **did not exist** before your first step, and creates maps for those who will follow.
2-4-6.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **TO-TA** unites three fields: **MA=NIMA** (Air, rays), **ZHI=ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). The energy moves like a **searchlight beam** through the unknown, lighting the path step by step. NIMA emits a fan of airy rays — **reconnaissance in all directions** at once, reading possibilities and threats. ZINGRA spins the discovered vector into a **fiery spiral** — accelerating the motion and giving it powerful impulse. TUMA follows the spiral as a **water wave**, turning the charted path into a passable road. Pattern: scanning — spiral acceleration — wave-laid path. Each cycle opens new territory and creates a platform for the next step. In the body this feels like lightness in the chest, heat in the belly, and the sensation of a road forming beneath the soles.
2-4-6.light_power:
- **Spirit of the pioneer:** fearless joy in meeting the unknown, the ability to see possibilities where others see dead ends
- **Living renewal:** every action becomes a discovery — even the familiar reveals new facets, routine and boredom vanish
- **Creating paths for others:** your pioneering experience becomes a map for those who follow — you blaze the trails
- **Overcoming stagnation:** TO-TA instantly restores motion where everything has frozen — in projects, relationships, growth
- **Intuitive navigation in the unknown:** the ability to take true steps even when logic sees no path — NIMA's rays find the way before the mind does
2-4-6.shadow:
- **Inability to stop:** pioneering becomes eternal flight forward, where every new step devalues the previous one. *Correction:* after each discovery take a pause, root yourself, anchor what was found.
- **Burning bridges:** ZINGRA's fiery spiral may destroy everything in its path, leaving nothing behind — no relationships, no achievements. *Correction:* consciously keep ties with the road already walked, build bridges rather than burn them.
- **Eternal wandering:** a pioneer without a home, with no constancy in anything — neither place, nor work, nor people. *Correction:* remember that the depth of discovery matters more than the number of new territories.
- **Obsession with novelty:** addiction to the adrenaline of the new, which masks fear of depth and permanence. *Correction:* practice deep immersion in what has already been opened.
2-4-6.activation:
1. **Begin in motion.** Activation happens on the move — stand up and start walking, even if you do not know where. Let your feet carry you, trust the first impulse.
2. **Ray scanning.** With each step feel NIMA's rays radiating from your chest — in all directions at once, reading the space, sensing the unknown.
3. **Fiery spiral.** Feel ZINGRA winding a hot spiral in your belly — your inner engine, the generator of motion and courage. The spiral pushes you forward.
4. **Wave of path.** Say: "TO-TA, I open the new with every step." Feel TUMA's water wave radiating from your feet, laying down the road. Let your feet carry you where inner knowing calls.
2-4-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Edge of the Unknown."** Visualize yourself standing at the edge of familiar territory — before you lies a **mist of the unknown**, dense and beckoning. Glowing rays of NIMA spread from your chest, piercing the mist and lighting fragments of the path — you glimpse trees, stones, rivers, but not the whole picture. In your belly a fiery spiral of ZINGRA ignites — it pulls you forward with joyful eagerness. Take a mental step — and firm ground appears beneath your foot, washed by TUMA's wave. With every step the mist parts, revealing new landscape. You are the first to walk on this land. Continue 15–20 minutes, remembering the feeling of joy in discovery.
2-4-6.application:
- **Launching new projects:** activate TO-TA at the start of a new endeavor — the gift fills you with enthusiasm, vision, and courage for the first step
- **Travel:** activation before a journey turns any place into a land of discovery, where every turn is an adventure
- **Learning:** TO-TA helps absorb the new with the hunger and lightness of a child, turning study into exploration
- **Changing direction:** when it is time to change profession, place, or circle — the gift grants courage to step into the unknown
- **Overcoming stagnation:** if life has frozen — TO-TA returns motion, breaking the ice of routine with a first bold step
2-4-6.safety:
- **Finish what you begin.** Balance pioneering with rooting — after reconnaissance, return and consolidate what was found before rushing to the next horizon.
- **Check your motivation.** Do not confuse fleeing from problems with moving forward — honestly ask yourself: "Am I going toward the new or running from the old?"
- **Integrate discoveries.** After active work with the gift give yourself time of silence — let discoveries settle and become part of your experience, rather than flashing past.
2-4-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Air (reconnaissance) + Fire (engine) + Water (laying the path)
- **Symbol:** Compass with diverging rays; fiery spiral against a sea wave
- **Color:** White with a fiery-orange core and deep-blue current
- **Helper stones:** Labradorite, carnelian, larimar
- **State:** Joy of discovery, fearless curiosity, flowing motion

3-3-6.essence: **TU-RA** is the gift of double Water, the **wheel of samsara**, the endless cycle of cause and effect, in which birth and death are merely two turns of the same wheel. **ANDRA** (Water, spiral) in the MA position spins a **descending water spiral** — immersion into matter, the beginning of a cycle, embodiment of spirit into form. **ANDRA** (Water, spiral) in the ZHI position spins an **ascending water spiral** — the rise from matter, the close of a cycle, the return of form to spirit. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level closes both spirals with a **continuous wave**, ensuring seamless passage from end to beginning and back. Triple Water is absolute fluidity, where **any action begets consequence**, and every consequence becomes the cause of a new turn. TU-RA grants not merely knowledge of cycles, but **conscious living-through** of beginning and end as one whole.
3-3-6.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **TU-RA** unites three fields: **MA=ANDRA** (Water, spiral), **ZHI=ANDRA** (Water, spiral), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). The energy moves in a **figure of infinity** — two water spirals meeting at a central point. The first ANDRA spins clockwise — this is the **stream of manifestation**, descent into form, birth, growth, blossoming. The second ANDRA spins counter-clockwise — the **stream of dissolution**, fading, return to the source. TUMA creates a **wave-bridge** between the two spirals, ensuring continuity of passage: the end of one cycle flows smoothly into the beginning of the next. At the center where the spirals cross lies the **point of awareness** — the only place where freedom from endless repetition is possible. In the body this feels like deep pulsation in the belly and a sense of rotation — gentle, unstoppable, enchanting.
3-3-6.light_power:
- **Wisdom of cycles:** deep understanding of the law of cause and effect — the ability to see how your actions create waves that return to you across time and space
- **Karmic clairvoyance:** the gift opens memory of cycles of incarnation and allows wisdom to be drawn from them without repeating past mistakes
- **Conscious closing of cycles:** the ability to recognize karmic loops and close them consciously, freeing oneself from repetition
- **Wheel of wisdom:** TU-RA turns the wheel of suffering into the wheel of knowing — each turn brings a new level of awareness
- **Mastery of transitions:** the skill of living through endings and beginnings with dignity and acceptance — the death of the old and birth of the new become one breath
3-3-6.shadow:
- **Sense of no-way-out:** sinking into the feeling of endless repetition — the same mistakes, the same scenarios, the same dead ends. *Correction:* remember that awareness of a cycle is already an exit from it; blind repetition is impossible once you see the pattern.
- **Fatalism and doom:** the belief "everything is predetermined, nothing can be changed," surrendering oneself to the wheel. *Correction:* remember the point of awareness at the center — that is where free will lives.
- **Whirlpool of the past:** double ANDRA can pull one into obsessive re-living of past incarnations and events, losing connection with the present. *Correction:* ground through the body and the current moment, use the past as a lesson and not as a home.
- **Karmic heaviness:** trying to carry all cycles at once — others' karmas, past debts, unlived lives. *Correction:* work with one cycle at a time, not loading yourself with the weight of all incarnations.
3-3-6.activation:
1. **Awareness of the cycle.** Sit in silence and say: "I am in a cycle, and I see it." Place your left hand on your belly, right on your heart, creating a link between the two ANDRA spirals.
2. **Breathing of the double spiral.** On the inhale feel the descending spiral — from crown to roots, immersion into experience, embodiment. On the exhale — the ascending spiral — from roots to crown, drawing out wisdom, release.
3. **Point of stillness.** In the instant between inhale and exhale find the **center of awareness** — the point where the wheel is still. Speak the code "TU-RA" three times, lingering a little longer in that point each time.
4. **Closing a cycle.** Name one concrete cycle you wish to close. Inhale its lesson, exhale its attachment. Release the wheel — let it spin while you remain at the center.
3-3-6.meditation: **Meditation "The Axle of the Wheel."** Sit with closed eyes and visualize before you an enormous wheel turning slowly and majestically. On one side — the descending water spiral: birth, growth, blossoming, fullness. On the other — the ascending: fading, dissolution, return to the source, silence. Between them — the continuous wave of TUMA, linking end and beginning. Now find the **center of the wheel** — the motionless axle around which everything turns. This is your true "I" — the witness who observes the cycles but is not caught by them. Step into this axle. Feel absolute peace in the midst of eternal turning. Meditate 20–30 minutes, deepening the experience of stillness at the center of motion.
3-3-6.application:
- **Recognizing life patterns:** use TU-RA to detect recurring scenarios in relationships, finances, health, career
- **Conscious closing of cycles:** become aware of the lesson, accept it with gratitude — and the cycle closes naturally, without struggle
- **Making decisions:** TU-RA reveals the long-term karmic consequences of each choice — a vision unavailable to the ordinary mind
- **Life transitions:** the gift helps consciously close one chapter and open another — with dignity and without clinging
- **Deep therapeutic work:** helps see the root causes of recurring problems and break the chain of repetition
3-3-6.safety:
- **Do not slip into fatalism.** The wheel of samsara does not mean absence of free will — awareness at the center of the wheel is itself freedom.
- **Work with one cycle.** Double ANDRA may stir strong emotional experiences — do not try to carry all incarnations at once. One cycle, one lesson, one liberation at a time.
- **Ground yourself after practice.** Triple water can carry you from the body. Be sure to eat, move, drink warm water. Remember: the aim is not to stop the wheel, but to find freedom at its center.
3-3-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water (triple) — absolute fluidity, three water streams
- **Symbol:** Infinity sign made of two water spirals; a wheel with a still axle
- **Color:** Indigo, violet, deep blue — three shades of the water element
- **Helper stones:** Amethyst, lapis lazuli, charoite
- **State:** Conscious fluidity, wisdom of cycles, peace at the center of turning

4-2-6.essence: **E-MA** is the gift of boundless fantasy, a **fiery spiral of imagination** capable of endowing any object with new qualities and turning the ordinary into the magical. **ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral) in the MA position spins a **fiery vortex of creative force** that melts old definitions and clears space for the new. **NIMA** (Air, rays) in the ZHI position radiates **streams of light**, each carrying a specific new quality — protection, luck, health, clarity. **TUMA** (Water, wave) at the KUN level anchors what has been created with a **water fixation**, imprinting the new qualities into the fabric of reality. This is the gift of **dressing one thing as another** — a stone becomes a talisman, a word becomes a spell, an ordinary object becomes an amulet of power. E-MA opens a portal between the imagined and the real, where thought gains the **density of substance** and fantasy becomes a tool for transforming the world.
4-2-6.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **E-MA** unites three fields: **MA=ZINGRA** (Fire, spiral), **ZHI=NIMA** (Air, rays), **KUN=TUMA** (Water, wave). The energy moves like a **fiery vortex** that wraps the object and rewrites its qualities. ZINGRA spins a spiral around the chosen object or idea — **dissolving old definitions**, softening form, making it plastic for change. NIMA pierces the object with **rays of new qualities** — each ray carries a defined property, like paint on an artist's brush. TUMA washes the object with a wave and **fixes** it — the new qualities become imprinted into the structure of the object, becoming inseparable from it. Pattern: fiery melting — radiant endowment — water fixation. The energy works as an **alchemical furnace**, in which the lead of the ordinary turns into the gold of magic. In the body this feels as heat in the solar plexus, lightness in the fingers, and tingling in the palms.
4-2-6.light_power:
- **Boundless creative imagination:** the ability to create vivid, living images of such intensity that they begin to manifest in matter
- **Charging amulets and talismans:** E-MA is made for endowing objects with the power of intention — turning ordinary things into objects of power
- **Alchemy of re-meaning:** the ability to "redress" illness as health, fear as courage, problem as opportunity, changing the very essence of a phenomenon
- **Creative portal:** artists, writers, inventors with active E-MA create new worlds that influence reality
- **Healing visualization:** fantasy of such vividness that an imagined healing triggers real processes in the body
4-2-6.shadow:
- **Blurring of reality:** fantasy swallows actuality — a person begins to live in an imagined world, losing connection with what is. *Correction:* check daily: "Where am I — in imagination or in life?" Ground through the body and simple actions.
- **Unconscious charging of objects:** the surrounding space becomes saturated with fears, anxieties, obsessive thoughts — objects absorb the negative. *Correction:* regularly cleanse your space and charged objects, become aware of your emotional background.
- **Illusion instead of creativity:** "redressing" lies as truth, when fantasy hides essence instead of revealing it. *Correction:* use imagination to amplify truth, not to mask it.
- **Escape into imagined worlds:** fictional realities replace living life — fantasy becomes a drug. *Correction:* direct imagination toward improving real life, not toward creating an alternative one.
4-2-6.activation:
1. **Awakening the spiral.** Feel ZINGRA's fiery spiral in the solar plexus — it begins to spin slowly, generating creative heat. Let it gather strength.
2. **Choosing an object.** Take any object in your hands — a stone, ring, key, coin — and feel it as it is now. Accept its ordinariness.
3. **Fiery melting and radiant endowment.** Spin a mental ZINGRA spiral around the object — a fiery vortex softening its qualities. Then direct NIMA's rays from your palms — invest a new quality into the object: protection, luck, health, clarity.
4. **Water fixation.** Wash the object with TUMA's wave — imagine water sealing in the new qualities. Say: "E-MA, I endow this object with the power of my intention." The object is charged.
4-2-6.meditation: **Meditation "Alchemical Canvas."** Sit with closed eyes and imagine an endless white canvas before you — a space of pure possibility. Feel ZINGRA's fiery spiral in the solar plexus — it begins to turn, generating images. Allow any images to appear on the canvas — do not control, simply watch fantasy painting worlds. Now choose one image and direct NIMA's rays at it from your palms — endow it with a specific quality, give it a name and property. Wash the image with TUMA's wave — and see it gain density, becoming almost tangible. Play: "redress" fear as courage, loneliness as freedom, problem as adventure. Meditate 15–20 minutes, enjoying the boundlessness of your imagination.
4-2-6.application:
- **Charging amulets and objects of power:** E-MA is made for this — endowing ordinary objects with special properties through the fire of imagination
- **Creative professions:** writers, artists, designers, musicians — activate the gift before beginning the creative process
- **Reframing situations:** "redress" a problem as a task, an obstacle as a springboard, a loss as a release
- **Working with children:** E-MA speaks the language of children's imagination — use it for healing, learning, and development of children
- **Creating ritual spaces:** the gift lets you saturate places and objects with intention, turning an ordinary room into a temple
4-2-6.safety:
- **Maintain connection with reality.** Fantasy should enrich life, not replace it. If the imagined world has become more attractive than the real one — that is a signal to return to the body.
- **Do not charge in dark states.** Never charge objects in a state of anger, fear, or despair — they will absorb those vibrations and radiate them. Periodically cleanse charged objects.
- **Imagination is not deception.** Do not use the gift for manipulation — "redressing" lies as truth has karmic consequences. After intense work be sure to return to the body: rinse with water, stamp your feet, breathe fresh air.
4-2-6.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire (creative vortex) + Air (rays of qualities) + Water (fixation)
- **Symbol:** Fiery spiral wrapping an object; alchemical crucible; artist's brush
- **Color:** Fiery-orange with white rays and deep-blue wave of fixation
- **Helper stones:** Fire agate, moonstone, fluorite
- **State:** Creative ecstasy, vividness of imagination, playful alchemy

4-3-7.essence: **AR-HEY** is the gift of the architect of reality, the ability to digitize the inner world and build from it a precise projection in the outer space. Like a master-builder who first creates the blueprint in mind and only then erects the building, AR-HEY turns mental images into concrete material forms. Its motto — "Life belongs to me" — sounds not as appropriation but as the acceptance of full responsibility for every detail of your reality. This gift teaches that chaos is merely an order not yet perceived. When the inner world is structured and ordered, outer reality obediently follows, arranging itself by the invisible blueprint of consciousness. AR-HEY is the tuner who brings the instrument of life into perfect resonance.
4-3-7.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **AR-HEY** unites three fields: **MA=ZINGRA** (Inner Fire, spiral outward), **ZHI=ANDRA** (Outer Water, spiral inward), and **KUN=ASTRA** (Outer Air, inhale-exhale). The fiery spiral ZINGRA unwinds from the center outward, setting direction and structure for the reality to come — a ray of will burning a path through the space of possibility. The water spiral ANDRA spins in the opposite direction, gathering scattered elements of the world into one system, drawing in needed resources and people. ASTRA provides the rhythm of materialization — on the inhale reality is read, on the exhale rewritten. In the body the energy is felt as a clear pulse between the solar plexus and the lower belly, accompanied by a sensation of order and clarity. The two opposing spirals create a funnel through which intention condenses into material form.
4-3-7.light_power:
- **Materialization of intentions** — the ability to turn clear inner images into concrete events, meetings, and circumstances in the outer world
- **Digitizing reality** — the skill of seeing the hidden structure of any situation, breaking chaos into elements and assembling a new order
- **Tuning the life space** — creating the needed reality through conscious restructuring of inner programs and beliefs
- **Managing the event stream** — the ability to draw in needed events and repel unneeded ones, building life by one's own blueprint
- **Structural clairvoyance** — seeing cause-and-effect ties as an architectural plan, where every element has its precise place and function
4-3-7.shadow:
- **Hyper-control of reality** — trying to control every detail of life leads to exhaustion and loss of spontaneity. A life built as a perfect mechanism loses its soul. *Correction:* leave room for living chaos, remember that the best blueprints contain space for improvisation.
- **Ossifying structures** — when inner order becomes a prison, and the blueprint of reality becomes a verdict. *Correction:* regularly revise your "plans of the universe," allowing them to refresh.
- **Cut off from the living flow** — excessive digitizing of the inner world can lead to loss of contact with feelings and body. *Correction:* balance structure with ANDRA's water element — feeling, fluidity, emotional openness.
- **Imposing your blueprint on others** — an architect rebuilding others' worlds without invitation. *Correction:* remember that "Life belongs to me" speaks of one's own life, not others'.
4-3-7.activation:
1. **Digitizing the current state.** Sit in silence and close your eyes. Picture your current life as a blueprint or scheme — with rooms, corridors, walls. Inspect this blueprint carefully: where are the empty rooms? Where are the blocked passages? Where are the load-bearing walls that must not be moved?
2. **Drafting a new blueprint.** Say aloud: "Life belongs to me." Feel an invisible architect's tool appear in your hands with these words. Begin redrawing the blueprint — removing unneeded walls, opening new doors, creating space for what you want.
3. **Launching the spirals.** Feel ZINGRA's fiery spiral in the solar plexus unwinding outward — it carries your new blueprint into the world. At the same time the water spiral ANDRA winds from the world to you — gathering resources for construction.
4. **Breath of ASTRA.** Begin to breathe consciously: on the inhale you read current reality, on the exhale you imprint the new pattern. With every breath cycle the blueprint thickens, becoming more and more real.
4-3-7.meditation: **Meditation "Tota's Drafting Table."** Find a quiet place and take a sheet of paper and a pencil. Close your eyes for a minute and say: "Life belongs to me." Then open your eyes and sketch the diagram of your current reality — intuitively, without thinking, using lines, circles, arrows. Look at the resulting blueprint. Now close your eyes again and imagine two spirals — fiery and water — beginning to spin in the belly, creating between them a space of pure order. Breathe rhythmically: inhale — read, exhale — rewrite. Imagine your blueprint coming alive, gaining volume and color. After 15 minutes open your eyes and draw a new blueprint — the desired reality. Hang it in a visible place as an anchor of materialization.
4-3-7.application:
- **Structuring the life space** — use AR-HEY to bring order in any sphere of life, from physical space to relationships and finances.
- **Materializing projects** — this gift is ideal for launching new endeavors, when an idea must be turned into a clear plan and brought into being.
- **Tuning toward the gift GRAD** — AR-HEY is the preparatory gift for GRAD, creating the inner structure on which the unifying force is then laid.
- **Rebuilding reality after crisis** — when the old world is destroyed, AR-HEY helps to design and raise a new one on a clean foundation.
- **Working with visualization** — creating detailed mental blueprints of the desired with subsequent materialization through the breath of ASTRA.
4-3-7.safety:
- **Do not rebuild everything at once.** An architect who tears down all walls at once collapses the building. Introduce changes into reality gradually, giving the structure time to strengthen.
- **Keep contact with the body.** Digitizing the inner world can pull you into abstractions. Regularly return to bodily sensations, ground through physical activity.
- **Do not confuse control with guidance.** Control squeezes; guidance directs. AR-HEY works through soft direction, not through harsh suppression.
- **After deep practice** be sure to drink water and remain in silence — give the new blueprint time to imprint into the fabric of reality.
4-3-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire (directing) + Water (gathering) + Air (rhythm-giving)
- **Symbol:** Two opposing spirals forming a funnel; an architect's compass
- **Color:** Fiery-gold with emerald flecks, framed in light-blue glow
- **Motto:** "Life belongs to me"
- **Body area:** Solar plexus, belly, area of the diaphragm
- **Time of practice:** Morning, the moment of passage from night to day, when reality is most plastic
- **Supporting practices:** Drawing blueprints and schemes, working with visualization, structural thinking
- **Helper stones:** Citrine, tiger's eye, aquamarine
- **Linked gift:** GRAD (3-4-7) — the next stage after tuning

2-5-7.essence: **BRA-KH-MA** is the gift of the living breath of the Universe, the pulsation of inhale and exhale through which the world exchanges energy with every being. This is cosmic breath, in which expansion alternates with contraction, and giving with receiving. BRA-KH-MA grants the ability to materialize the desired through healthy interchange with the world — not through grasping or renunciation, but through the natural rhythm of "took — gave." This gift expands attention outward, embracing ever larger spaces of reality, while at the same time narrowing the focus to a point of crystal clarity. It is also a cleanser of mental space — capable of catching and removing mental parasites: obsessive thoughts, foreign programs, destructive beliefs. BRA-KH-MA is an amplifying gift, multiplying any energy passed through its breathing rhythm.
2-5-7.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **BRA-KH-MA** weaves three fields: **MA=NIMA** (Inner Air, rays from the center), **ZHI=LUBA** (Outer Fire, point), and **KUN=ASTRA** (Outer Air, inhale-exhale). Double air — inner NIMA and outer ASTRA — creates a most powerful breathing system: inner rays radiate from center to periphery, while the outer rhythm of inhale-exhale sets pulsation through the whole system. The fiery point LUBA at the center is the core, the amplifier through which every impulse passes, multiplied many times over. The energy moves like breath: on the inhale — contraction toward the fiery point, concentration; on the exhale — burst of rays in all directions, expansion. In the body it is felt as a powerful pulsation in the chest and solar plexus, alternation of expansion and contraction, a sense of cosmic scale of breathing.
2-5-7.light_power:
- **Materialization through breath** — the ability to condense thought-forms to material embodiment, using the rhythm of inhale-exhale as an instrument of creation
- **Expansion of the field of attention** — the skill of embracing enormous spaces with attention, seeing the whole picture while holding details
- **Cleansing from mental parasites** — BRA-KH-MA exhales obsessive thoughts, foreign installations, and destructive programs from mental space
- **Amplification of any energy** — everything that passes through BRA-KH-MA's breathing rhythm increases many times over, like sound in a resonator
- **Healthy interchange with the world** — establishing the right balance between what you take from the world and what you give
2-5-7.shadow:
- **Hyperventilation of consciousness** — excessive expansion of attention without contraction leads to scatter, anxiety, and loss of center. *Correction:* always alternate expansion with contraction, inhale with exhale, without getting stuck in any phase.
- **Amplification of negativity** — BRA-KH-MA amplifies any energy, including fear, anger, doubt. Entering the practice in a negative state will amplify it. *Correction:* before activating the gift, be sure to cleanse the emotional field, enter neutrality.
- **Mental gluttony** — absorbing huge volumes of information without digesting, endless inhale without exhale. *Correction:* after each "inhale" of new knowledge make an "exhale" — application, practice, giving.
- **Parasitic dependence on others' energy** — if interchange is disrupted, the practitioner begins unconsciously to draw energy from those around. *Correction:* regularly check the balance of exchange, give no less than you take.
2-5-7.activation:
1. **Setting the rhythm.** Sit with a straight back. Begin conscious breathing: a slow deep inhale to a count of 4, hold for 2, a slow exhale to a count of 4, hold for 2. This is the basic rhythm of BRA-KH-MA.
2. **Igniting the center.** Direct attention to the point of the solar plexus — this is LUBA, the fiery core of the amplifier. Imagine there a bright white point that grows brighter with every breath.
3. **Expansion-contraction.** On the inhale imagine NIMA's rays gathering from space toward the fiery point — energy flows from every direction to the center. On the exhale — the rays burst out from the center, expanding your field of attention to the bounds of the room, the house, the city, the planet.
4. **Cleansing.** During the phase of expansion imagine the exhale carrying everything foreign out of your mental space — mental parasites, obsessive thoughts, others' voices. They are carried off by the stream, like dust on the wind.
2-5-7.meditation: **Meditation "Cosmic Breath."** Lie on your back in a comfortable place, spread your arms to the sides palms up. Close your eyes and breathe in the rhythm of BRA-KH-MA: inhale — contraction, exhale — expansion. With each inhale imagine drawing the light of the Universe into yourself — stars, galaxies, cosmic currents compress to one dazzling point in your center. With each exhale this point explodes, and you expand to the size of the Universe, becoming all space. You are the breath of the world. On the inhale the world enters you, on the exhale you enter the world. Continue 20 minutes, letting the scale grow with every cycle. End the meditation by returning to ordinary size and feeling the clear boundaries of your body.
2-5-7.application:
- **Materialization of intentions** — formulate an intention, inhale it into the fiery point LUBA and exhale it into the world, letting it amplify and take form.
- **Cleansing of the mental field** — use BRA-KH-MA's breath to remove obsessive thoughts, anxious states, and others' mental programs.
- **Amplification of other practices** — any gift passed through BRA-KH-MA's breathing rhythm works many times more powerfully.
- **Restoration of energy exchange** — if you feel you give more than you receive, or vice versa, BRA-KH-MA will restore a healthy balance.
- **Expansion of perception** — practice for the development of the ability to see situations on a grand scale, embracing all levels at once.
2-5-7.safety:
- **Do not practice in a negative state.** BRA-KH-MA amplifies everything that passes through. First reach a neutral or positive state, then turn on the amplifier.
- **Keep balance of phases.** Expansion without contraction leads to loss of center. Contraction without expansion — to stagnation. Always alternate inhale and exhale evenly.
- **Ground after practice.** Cosmic expansion may leave a sense of being "lost" in space. Be sure to return to the body: feel the feet, palms, breath.
- **Do not use for manipulation.** An amplifying gift turned against another's will returns to the practitioner as a multiplied reverse wave.
2-5-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Air (leading, double) + Fire (amplifying)
- **Symbol:** A pulsating star, expanding and contracting; lungs of the Universe
- **Color:** Bluish-white with a fiery point in the center
- **Body area:** Solar plexus (LUBA), chest, lungs
- **Time of practice:** Dawn (inhale of the world) or sunset (exhale of the world)
- **Supporting practices:** Pranayama, breathing techniques, meditation on expansion-contraction
- **Helper stones:** Rock crystal, fire agate, celestite
- **Link:** Opposite of PRA-NA (8-8-7, exhale). BRA-KH-MA — inhale, PRA-NA — exhale
- **State:** Rhythmic pulsation, cosmic scale, crystal clarity of consciousness

3-4-7.essence: **GRAD** is the gift of the architect of unity, the force capable of joining the scattered into a living system. Like an ancient city encircled by a wall, GRAD gathers around itself heterogeneous elements — people, energies, events — and binds them into a single organism, where each part strengthens the whole. This is a system that unites the diverse around a single center, turning chaos into cosmos. GRAD governs the outer state of reality, allowing perception of the world to change — and through that, the world itself. This gift can be used in healing, where it helps a person literally pass from the reality of illness into the reality of health. Where AR-HEY creates the blueprint, GRAD raises from it a living city.
3-4-7.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **GRAD** unites three fields: **MA=ANDRA** (Inner Water, spiral inward), **ZHI=ZINGRA** (Outer Fire, spiral outward), and **KUN=ASTRA** (Outer Air, inhale-exhale). The water spiral ANDRA draws scattered elements to the center, like a whirlpool gathers everything afloat on the surface. The fiery spiral ZINGRA unwinds outward, binding the gathered into a single structure and granting each element its function in the system. ASTRA provides the living breath of this system — without it GRAD would be a dead construction, with it — a living organism. In the body it is felt as warm rotation in the belly and solar plexus, a sensation of attraction and simultaneous expansion, as if you become the center toward which everything strives.
3-4-7.light_power:
- **Uniting the scattered** — the ability to gather heterogeneous people, ideas, or resources into a single working system, where each element is in its place
- **Shifting perception of reality** — mastery of switching between different realities, seeing the world from several points of view at once
- **Healing through transfer to another reality** — the ability to help a person leave the reality of illness and enter the reality of health
- **Creating living systems** — be it a community, a project, or a family — GRAD makes the whole greater than the sum of its parts
- **Managing the outer state** — changing outer circumstances through conscious re-tuning of perception
3-4-7.shadow:
- **Absorbing individuality** — the GRAD system can become so powerful that individual elements lose their uniqueness, dissolving into the whole. *Correction:* true unity preserves the uniqueness of every part, as a city keeps the singularity of every house.
- **Forced unification** — trying by force to join what is not meant to be together creates an ugly construction. *Correction:* attract rather than drag; invite rather than compel.
- **Illusion of changing reality** — substituting real transition with mental fantasizing. *Correction:* a transition to another reality is always accompanied by tangible changes in the body and circumstances.
- **Fixation on outer governance** — fascination with manipulating the outer world while forgetting the inner state. *Correction:* remember that outer governance begins with inner tuning.
3-4-7.activation:
1. **Defining the center.** Stand straight and feel yourself as the center, the axis around which the world may align. Place a hand on the belly — here pulses the core of GRAD.
2. **Starting the whirlpool.** Imagine from the depth of your center a water spiral ANDRA beginning to unwind — it softly but persistently draws toward you everything that should become part of your system. The right people, resources, possibilities — all begin to flow toward the center.
3. **Binding with fire.** When the elements are gathered, activate the fiery spiral ZINGRA — it unwinds outward, creating links between all parts, distributing roles, building structure. Each element gets its place and function.
4. **Animating with breath.** Begin to breathe ASTRA — the rhythmic inhale-exhale animates the created system. On the inhale the system renews, on the exhale — radiates one force. GRAD has become alive.
3-4-7.meditation: **Meditation "City of Light."** Sit in silence and close your eyes. Imagine you are standing on a high hill, looking down into a valley. In the valley — chaos: scattered stones, wandering people, dispersed lights. With each inhale you draw these elements to the foot of the hill. With each exhale — a fiery force builds a city from them: walls rise, streets lay down, houses fill with light. Watch as from chaos a beautiful living city is born, where each element is in its place and together they create something greater.
