Feel how this city breathes — inhale and exhale pass through it, like wind through streets. You are the founder and heart of this city. Remain in this state 15–20 minutes, then gently return.
3-4-7.application:
- **Creating teams and communities** — GRAD is ideal for uniting diverse people around a common goal, creating working groups, family systems, spiritual communities.
- **Healing through change of reality** — help an ill person see and feel a reality in which they are well, and lead them there through the breath of ASTRA.
- **Integration after crisis** — when life has shattered to fragments, GRAD gathers them into a new, more perfect wholeness.
- **Project management** — the ability to see how different elements of a project are linked, and distribute resources for maximum efficiency.
- **Work after AR-HEY** — when the blueprint is created, GRAD fills it with life and unites it into a working system.
3-4-7.safety:
- **Do not unite the incompatible.** If elements actively resist unification, that is a signal — they are not meant for one system. Forced joining creates an unstable construction.
- **First inside, then outside.** Before governing the outer state, ensure your inner state is stable. An architect in chaos builds chaos.
- **Change of reality in healing requires the patient's readiness.** One cannot lead a person into the reality of health if they unconsciously cling to the reality of illness. First — work with resistance.
- **Give the system time to adapt.** A new GRAD is not built in a day — elements need time to mesh with each other and find their places.
3-4-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water (gathering) + Fire (binding) + Air (animating)
- **Symbol:** A city on a hill surrounded by a wall; a spiral gathering stars
- **Color:** Emerald-gold with light-blue breath
- **Body area:** Belly, solar plexus, area around the navel
- **Time of practice:** Midday, when energy is at maximum and all elements are "visible"
- **Supporting practices:** Working with groups, creating mandalas, building systems
- **Helper stones:** Emerald, golden topaz, lapis lazuli
- **Link:** Development of the gift AR-HEY (4-3-7), preparation for larger-scale governance
- **State:** Centeredness, sense of being the axis around which the world turns

1-6-7.essence: **Z-MAN** is the gift of governing the flow of time, the ancient serpent coiled into a ring of eternity. Like a water dragon gliding between currents of time, Z-MAN allows the subjective perception of the time stream to slow or accelerate. Within this gift lies the aspect of eternal youth — constant focus of attention on the present moment literally slows time, halting aging at the energetic level. Z-MAN teaches that time is not a linear river, but a living being with whom one may agree. The practitioner of this gift is able to synchronize with another person and shift them into a different time state — from accelerated, fussy time into slow, deep, healing time.
1-6-7.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **Z-MAN** weaves three fields: **MA=LOGOS** (Inner Earth, triangle), **ZHI=TUMA** (Outer Water, wave), and **KUN=ASTRA** (Outer Air, inhale-exhale). LOGOS gives an unmoving point of support — the eternal "now" from which one may observe the flow of time without being carried by the stream. The water wave TUMA is time itself, its tides, its acceleration and slowing. ASTRA creates the breathing rhythm that synchronizes the practitioner with the desired tempo of time. In the body the energy is felt as a smooth, wavelike motion along the spine — from below upward and back, like a serpent gliding the tree of the world. The area of the feet and the base of the spine becomes an anchor, while the area of throat and head — the point from which time can be redirected.
1-6-7.light_power:
- **Slowing time** — the ability to enter a state where minutes stretch into hours, allowing every moment to be lived deeply and a solution to be found in any situation
- **Accelerating processes** — the skill of compressing time for routine or hard periods, passing through them quickly and without loss
- **Aspect of eternal youth** — constant practice of focusing on the present slows the processes of aging, preserving the youth of body and spirit
- **Synchronization with others** — the ability to attune to another person's time stream and gently shift them into another state
- **Travel in the time of consciousness** — moving the focus of attention into the past for healing or into the future for foresight
1-6-7.shadow:
- **Falling out of time** — excessive slowing leads to complete loss of contact with social time, lateness, unfulfilled obligations. *Correction:* always keep an anchor in ordinary time — clocks, schedules, agreements.
- **Fear of aging** — fixation on the aspect of eternal youth may turn into a neurotic fear of time. *Correction:* the youth of Z-MAN is not a stopping of time, but harmony with it.
- **Manipulating another's time** — trying to slow or accelerate another's time without consent leads to energetic conflict. *Correction:* synchronization works only with voluntary contact.
- **Getting stuck in past or future** — the serpent of time may carry consciousness away from the present moment. *Correction:* LOGOS-triangle must always be active as an anchor in "now."
1-6-7.activation:
1. **Grounding in the eternal "now."** Stand barefoot on earth or floor. Feel LOGOS' support — the triangle of stability beneath the feet. Say: "I stand at the point where all times converge." This is your unmoving center.
2. **Awakening the serpent.** Direct attention to the base of the spine and imagine there a coiled water dragon — shimmering blue and silver. With each inhale it begins to slowly unfold, rising along the spine in wavelike motions.
3. **Tuning the tempo.** To slow time — slow the ASTRA breath, making each inhale and exhale as drawn-out as possible. The serpent moves more slowly, and time around you thickens. To accelerate — quicken the breath, the serpent moves faster, and time thins.
4. **Synchronization.** To change another person's time stream, first attune to their rhythm of breath, then gradually lead them to yours — slower or faster. The serpent of time flows over through contact.
1-6-7.meditation: **Meditation "Water Dragon of Time."** Sit by water or imagine before you a deep silent lake. Close your eyes and feel a silvery water dragon rising from the depth of the lake — the ancient serpent of time. It surfaces and wraps you with its coils — not squeezing, but softly swaying you, like a wave. Each of its coils is one year of your life. You may glide along its body backward — into the past, or forward — into the future. But the center — the dragon's head — is always in the present, next to you. Breathe in the rhythm of its swaying and feel time becoming thick and slow, like honey. In this thickness every second holds eternity. Stay here 20 minutes, feeling the eternal youth of the present moment. End by thanking the dragon and returning to the ordinary rhythm.
1-6-7.application:
- **Slowing aging** — daily practice of presence in the moment through the breath of Z-MAN slows energetic aging, keeping the body young and flexible.
- **Managing stressful situations** — in the moment of crisis slow time to find the optimal solution while those around have yet to react.
- **Healing through change of time stream** — lead the ill out of accelerated, stressful time into slow, healing time, where the body has time to recover.
- **Deep meditation** — slowing subjective time lets you live hours of deep practice in a few minutes of ordinary time.
- **Working with the past** — gliding back along the serpent of time, you can find and heal traumatic moments, changing their influence on the present.
1-6-7.safety:
- **Do not abuse slowing.** Constant slowing of time cuts you off from social reality. Practice consciously, returning to the ordinary rhythm after every session.
- **Synchronization with others requires consent.** Never try to change another person's time stream without their knowledge and permission — this is intrusion into their field.
- **Ground through LOGOS.** After practice be sure to activate the grounding triangle — stand on your feet, feel the support, return to "here and now."
- **Do not confuse eternal youth with denial of maturity.** Z-MAN preserves the youth of spirit and body, but does not cancel the wisdom of experience. Youth without maturity is infantilism.
1-6-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth (anchor) + Water (flow of time) + Air (rhythm)
- **Symbol:** A serpent coiled into a ring; a water dragon; an hourglass
- **Color:** Silvery-blue with earthy gold at the base
- **Body area:** Spine (entire), base (anchor), throat (governance)
- **Time of practice:** Twilight — the time between times, when day and night replace each other
- **Supporting practices:** Slow breathing, presence practices, contact with water
- **Helper stones:** Labradorite, moonstone, black obsidian
- **Image:** Water dragon, serpent of time, eternally young sage
- **State:** Timelessness, fluid stillness, dense silence of the present

6-1-7.essence: **MA-NA** is the gift of calling energy from the void, the heavenly manna descending in response to a pure request. Like the ancient miracle, when food fell from heaven for wanderers in the desert, MA-NA allows one to receive the very energy needed at the moment — one need only ask rightly. The essence of this gift lies in absolute synchronization with the flow of the Universe: what you ask for, you receive. But the secret is not in the wording of the request, but in the purity of intention and the depth of synchronization with the source. MA-NA teaches that the Universe is not stingy — it is endlessly generous, and the only thing standing between a person and abundance is the inability to receive. This gift is the mastery of the receiver, tuned to the right frequency and therefore catching the right signal.
6-1-7.energy_pattern: The energy formula of **MA-NA** combines three fields: **MA=TUMA** (Outer Water, wave), **ZHI=LOGOS** (Inner Earth, triangle), and **KUN=ASTRA** (Outer Air, inhale-exhale). The water wave TUMA is the flow of the Universe, the infinite sea of energy in which everything exists. The earthen triangle LOGOS is the point of reception, the funnel focusing the endless stream into a definite form. ASTRA creates the rhythm of request-receipt: inhale — formulating the request, exhale — accepting the answer. In the body the energy is felt as a descending stream — from above downward, from the crown to the feet, a soft, warm filling, as if a vessel is slowly filling with pure water. The crown area is the point of entry, the feet — the point of grounding the received.
6-1-7.light_power:
- **Calling needed energy** — the ability to draw from the field of the Universe exactly that resource which is needed now — be it health, inspiration, support, or material means
- **Synchronization with the stream of abundance** — tuning to a frequency where needs are met naturally, without struggle or effort
- **Mastery of pure request** — the skill of formulating intention so precisely and purely that the Universe responds instantly
- **Transformation of emptiness into fullness** — the ability to see in any emptiness not absence but potential, and to activate this potential
- **Nourishment from an invisible source** — when all visible resources are exhausted, MA-NA opens access to invisible abundance
6-1-7.shadow:
- **Infantile waiting for miracles** — replacing active co-creation with passive waiting for "heavenly manna" without one's own effort. *Correction:* MA-NA is a dialog with the Universe, not a one-way order. Your contribution is purity of intention and readiness to act.
- **Greed of requests** — endless asking without gratitude and without using what was already received. *Correction:* before asking for more, fully master and give thanks for what was already given.
- **Impure request** — if intention is clouded by fear, greed, or manipulation, in place of manna comes its distorted form. *Correction:* cleanse intention to crystal clarity before every request.
- **Dependence on an external source** — forgetting one's own inner force, shifting responsibility onto the "heavens." *Correction:* remember that MA-NA works through you, not instead of you.
6-1-7.activation:
1. **Creating the vessel.** Sit in silence, straighten your back. Imagine your body is a clean vessel, the triangular cup of LOGOS, ready to receive. Free the inner space from the noise of thoughts — the cleaner the vessel, the cleaner what comes into it.
2. **Formulating the request.** Clearly and simply formulate what you need. Not "I want," but "I receive." Not "give me," but "I am open to." The request must be specific and clean, without an admixture of fear or greed.
3. **Inhale of the request.** On a deep ASTRA inhale direct your request upward, through the crown, into the infinite field of the Universe — into the waves of TUMA. Imagine your request, like a ray, going into the sky.
4. **Exhale of receiving.** On the exhale relax and open to receiving. Feel how from above, through the crown, a stream begins to descend — warm, soft, filling. This is MA-NA — the Universe's response to your request. Allow it to fill the entire vessel of your body.
6-1-7.meditation: **Meditation "Heavenly Rain."** Choose a quiet place, preferably outdoors or by a window with a view of the sky. Close your eyes and imagine that above you is the infinite sky, full of glowing drops of energy. This is the field of MA-NA — the inexhaustible source of all that you need. Formulate your request and speak it aloud or in mind. Then imagine a warm golden rain beginning to pour from the sky — each drop carries exactly what you asked for. The drops enter through the crown and fill the body — from head to feet. Feel every cell saturated with the needed energy. Breathe rhythmically: inhale — request, exhale — receiving. After 15–20 minutes thank the sky and softly open your eyes.
6-1-7.application:
- **Restoration of resource** — when all strength is spent and it seems there is nowhere to take energy from, MA-NA opens an invisible channel of nourishment.
- **Attracting needed resources** — use to receive material and non-material resources for projects, goals, and life tasks.
- **Healing through filling** — instead of fighting illness, fill the ailing organ or area of the body with pure energy from the field of MA-NA.
- **Creative inspiration** — when the muse is silent, request through MA-NA a stream of creative energy and let it fill you.
- **Daily morning tuning** — begin each day with a short MA-NA request, filling yourself with energy for the tasks ahead.
6-1-7.safety:
- **Purity of vessel determines purity of what is received.** If within you is anger, fear, or envy, MA-NA will fill you with energy colored by these emotions. Before practice be sure to cleanse the inner space.
- **Gratitude is the key to the stream.** An ungrateful vessel closes. Every time after receiving — give thanks, even if what came was not quite what was expected.
- **Do not request what you are not ready for.** If the vessel is small and the request enormous, the stream can shatter the vessel. Grow gradually.
- **MA-NA does not work for causing harm.** Any request directed against another being returns to the sender in distorted form.
6-1-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water (stream) + Earth (receiver) + Air (rhythm of the request)
- **Symbol:** A cup filled from the heavens; golden rain; open palms
- **Color:** Golden-white, descending light
- **Body area:** Crown (entry), solar plexus (receiving), feet (grounding)
- **Time of practice:** Early morning, the first minutes after waking, when consciousness is still clean
- **Supporting practices:** Practices of gratitude, cleansing intentions, work with prayer
- **Helper stones:** Golden calcite, selenite, clear quartz
- **State:** Openness, acceptance, quiet joy of fullness

5-2-7.essence: **NI-RA** is the gift of the dream-cartographer, the traveler who lays routes through a multidimensional world. Like a pioneer mapping unexplored territories, NI-RA explores the spaces lying beyond ordinary perception and creates paths along which others may pass. This gift is a bridge between the visible and invisible, the known and unknown. NI-RA does not merely travel — it forges the way, leaving behind a luminous thread along which one may return or lead companions. The fiery point of LUBA at its center is the torch of the pioneer, and the airy rays of NIMA are the map unfolding in every direction.
5-2-7.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **NI-RA** combines three fields: **MA=LUBA** (external Fire, point), **ZHI=NIMA** (internal Air, rays from the center), and **KUN=ASTRA** (external Air, inhalation-exhalation). The fiery point LUBA is the torch of attention, a bright beam piercing the darkness of the unknown. The airy rays of NIMA radiate from the center in all directions, like the rays of a star or the arrows of a compass, scanning the space of possible routes. ASTRA provides the breathing rhythm of the journey — the inhale draws information from the unknown, the exhale lays the path. The double Air (NIMA + ASTRA) makes this gift exceptionally light and mobile — NI-RA moves through subtle worlds instantly. In the body, the energy is felt as lightness, a sense of flight, an expansion in the area of the third eye and the crown.
5-2-7.light_power:
- **Navigation in multidimensionality** — the ability to orient oneself in subtle worlds, dream spaces, and other dimensions as confidently as in the physical world
- **Pathfinding** — creating routes through the unknown along which others may follow — students, patients, seekers
- **Lucid dreaming** — mastery of dream space, transforming dreams into a tool of knowledge and transformation
- **Reading of spaces** — the ability to instantly «scan» any space — physical or subtle — determining its quality, dangers, and possibilities
- **Connecting worlds** — the skill of being a bridge between everyday reality and subtle planes, translating information from one level to another
5-2-7.shadow:
- **Loss of contact with the physical world** — excessive travel through subtle worlds leads to detachment from earthly reality, absent-mindedness, an inability to act in ordinary life. *Correction:* mandatory grounding after every journey, cultivating connection with the body.
- **Aimless wandering** — endless exploration without a map or compass turns the traveler into one who is lost. *Correction:* always hold a clear intention before entering subtle space.
- **Dependence on subtle worlds** — preferring dream spaces to ordinary life. *Correction:* remember that the map is created to enrich earthly life, not replace it.
- **Confusion of realities** — inability to distinguish information from subtle worlds from one's own fantasies. *Correction:* develop discernment, verify received information through practice.
5-2-7.activation:
1. **Lighting the torch.** Sit in a comfortable position, close your eyes. Find the fiery point LUBA at the center of the solar plexus and ignite it more brightly — this is your torch, which will illuminate the path through the unknown.
2. **Unfolding the map.** From the point LUBA release the rays of NIMA in all directions. Imagine them radiating like the arrows of a compass or rays of a star, scanning the space around you — visible and invisible. Each ray is a potential route.
3. **Choosing direction.** Formulate an intention — where you wish to go, what you wish to explore. Feel which of the ray-routes responds to your intention — it will become brighter, warmer, more inviting.
4. **Traveling on the breath.** Begin moving along the chosen route on the breath of ASTRA: the inhale propels you forward, the exhale anchors the path traveled, leaving behind a luminous thread by which you may return. Travel, observing and remembering.
5-2-7.meditation: **Meditation «The Star Navigator».** Lie down comfortably and close your eyes. Imagine that you are lying atop a mountain, and above you stretches an endless starry sky. Each star is a world, a space, a dimension. From your solar plexus rises a fiery torch-point and hovers before your third eye. From it, thin rays extend to the stars — these are your routes. Choose one star that draws you more strongly than the others. Direct the main ray to it and begin gliding along it on the breath — the inhale brings you closer to the star, the exhale leaves a silver trail behind you. Upon arriving at the star, explore the opened space — remember the images, sensations, messages. After 20 minutes, return along your trail back to the mountain peak and gently return to the body.
5-2-7.application:
- **Lucid dreaming** — practice NI-RA before sleep to enter the dream with a clear route and explore dream spaces consciously.
- **Exploring subtle spaces** — use for diagnosing energetic spaces, places, homes — reading the quality of energy and hidden influences.
- **A guide for others** — when someone has become lost in their inner world or is stuck, NI-RA can lay a route of exit for them.
- **Creative journeys** — artists, writers, musicians may use NI-RA to travel into spaces of inspiration and return from there with new ideas.
- **Finding solutions** — when the logical mind has reached an impasse, embark on a NI-RA journey and find the answer in spaces inaccessible to ordinary thinking.
5-2-7.safety:
- **Always leave a thread of return.** Never travel through subtle worlds without a route back. The breath of ASTRA is your Ariadne's thread; as long as you breathe consciously — you are safe.
- **Grounding after every journey is mandatory.** Stand on your feet, feel the floor, drink water, touch something solid. Lack of grounding leads to absent-mindedness and loss of energy.
- **Do not travel in a state of fear or illness.** In subtle worlds, your state determines what you encounter. Fear attracts the frightening, illness — the heavy.
- **Keep a travel journal.** Record routes, observations, and received messages — this develops discernment and creates your personal map of the multidimensional world.
5-2-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire (torch) + Air (double — navigation and breath)
- **Symbol:** A star with radiating rays, a compass rose, a luminous thread
- **Color:** White with a Golden core against an indigo background
- **Body area:** Third eye, solar plexus (torch), crown
- **Practice time:** Night, before sleep, or pre-dawn hours, when the boundary between worlds is thinnest
- **Supporting practices:** Lucid dreaming, dream journaling, meditation on the starry sky
- **Helper stones:** Labradorite, amethyst, star sapphire
- **State:** Lightness, curiosity, the clarity of the navigator, the quiet delight of the discoverer

8-8-7.essence: **PRA-NA** is the gift of the Universe's exhalation, expansion outward, the exit from a closed system into infinity. The double BITRA in its formula — double Earth, double circle — creates such a stable and dense foundation that the only possible movement is the exhale outward, beyond any boundaries. PRA-NA is the opposite of BRA-KH-MA: if that one is the cosmic inhale gathering the world into a point, then PRA-NA is the cosmic exhale, expanding one point to the size of the Universe. This gift serves relaxation at the deepest level — relaxation not of the muscles, but of the very structure of the «I», the dissolution of boundaries between oneself and the world. PRA-NA is close to all-embracing Love — the kind that does not choose and does not divide, but accepts all that exists as part of itself. Expansion of worldview, going beyond familiar frames, exhaling into the outer world all that has been accumulated — this is the essence of this gift.
8-8-7.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **PRA-NA** is unique in its symmetry: **MA=BITRA** (external Earth, circle) and **ZHI=BITRA** (external Earth, circle), enhanced by **KUN=ASTRA** (external Air, inhalation-exhalation). The double BITRA creates two concentric circles — the most powerful grounding, absolute stability, an unshakeable foundation. From this foundation, ASTRA produces one infinite exhalation — not sharp, but soft, expanding like ripples on water from a thrown stone. The double Earth guarantees that expansion will not destroy structure — the foundation is so firm that one can safely release all boundaries. In the body, the energy is felt as deep relaxation, beginning from the feet and rising upward, dissolving all tension. A sensation of gentle expansion in all directions, the melting of the body's boundaries.
8-8-7.light_power:
- **Deepest relaxation** — the ability to release tension not only in the muscles, but in the very structure of consciousness, in the patterns of control and holding
- **Expansion of worldview** — instant passage beyond the usual frames of thinking, vision of a picture infinitely wider than usual
- **All-embracing Love** — a state of unconditional acceptance of all that exists, the dissolution of separation into «one's own» and «another's»
- **Exit from closed systems** — the ability to see a way out where others see a dead end, to break any vicious circle
- **Transmission of peace and stillness** — the presence of one practicing PRA-NA naturally calms and expands the consciousness of those around
8-8-7.shadow:
- **Complete dissolution of boundaries** — excessive exhalation without inhalation leads to loss of self, blurring of personality, inability to say «no». *Correction:* remember the double BITRA — the foundation that preserves your integrity even in a state of expansion.
- **Flight from reality** — using expansion as a way to escape earthly tasks and responsibility. *Correction:* the double Earth in the formula reminds — one may expand only from a point of firm standing on the ground.
- **Spiritual narcissism** — the feeling of all-embracing love may become an object of self-admiration: «I am so spiritual, I love everyone». *Correction:* true love of PRA-NA is impersonal, there is no «I» in it.
- **Chronic relaxation** — inability to gather oneself, concentrate, act because of constant dwelling in a state of exhalation. *Correction:* alternate PRA-NA with BRA-KH-MA (the inhale), maintaining balance.
8-8-7.activation:
1. **Double grounding.** Stand barefoot or sit, feeling support. Imagine beneath you two circles of BITRA — one beneath the feet, the second somewhat deeper, in the earth. This is your double foundation, absolutely stable. Feel how the Earth holds you reliably and unshakably.
2. **Release.** When grounding is firm, begin to let go. Release the tension in the body — muscle by muscle, clamp by clamp. Release control over thoughts. Release expectations and plans. Feel how with each exhale you become lighter.
3. **The Great Exhalation.** Take a deep inhale and begin a long, infinitely long exhalation. With this exhale, expand beyond the body — into the room, into the city, into the planet, into space. The boundaries melt, but the foundation remains firm.
4. **Abiding in expansion.** Remain in the state of expansion as long as is comfortable. You are simultaneously here, on the earth, and everywhere. This is PRA-NA — the infinite exhalation of Love.
8-8-7.meditation: **Meditation «The Melting Horizon».** Find a place with a wide view — by a window, on a balcony, in nature. Sit comfortably and stably, feeling the support of the double Earth beneath you. Close your eyes and imagine that you are gazing at the horizon. With each exhale, the horizon recedes farther — and farther — and farther, until it disappears altogether. The world becomes infinite. You expand together with it, dissolving into all that is. There are no boundaries, no division — only an endless, warm, all-embracing space of Love. The double BITRA beneath you is like the roots of a tree going deep into the earth. The crown spreads to the stars. Remain in this state for 20 minutes, then gently return the horizon to its place and open your eyes.
8-8-7.application:
- **Deep relaxation** — use PRA-NA after stress, conflict, or a tense period for a complete release of accumulated tension.
- **Expansion of consciousness** — when the mind has reached an impasse and it seems there is no way out, PRA-NA expands perspective and opens solutions invisible from narrow focus.
- **Working with fears** — fear contracts, PRA-NA expands. Exhale your fear into infinity — on the scale of the Universe it dissolves.
- **Harmonization of space** — presence in a PRA-NA state fills space with peace and acceptance, transforming the atmosphere.
- **Balance with BRA-KH-MA** — if you have practiced much of the inhale (contraction, concentration), PRA-NA will restore equilibrium through the exhale (expansion, release).
8-8-7.safety:
- **Mandatory grounding.** The double BITRA is your anchor. Never expand without prior firm grounding. Without roots, the tree, having spread its crown, falls.
- **Do not confuse relaxation with apathy.** PRA-NA is active expansion, not passive fading. If after practice you feel not peace but indifference — you have entered the shadow of the gift.
- **Alternate with BRA-KH-MA.** An infinite exhale without an inhale empties. Practice PRA-NA and BRA-KH-MA as a complementary pair, preserving the balance of expansion and contraction.
- **Do not dissolve another's boundaries.** The all-embracing love of PRA-NA does not mean intrusion into another's space. Expand within your own field, allowing others to decide for themselves whether they wish to expand together with you.
8-8-7.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth (double, foundation) + Air (exhale)
- **Symbol:** Ripples on water radiating from the center; a tree with an infinite crown; open arms
- **Color:** Warm Golden-green, transitioning into infinite Light blue
- **Body area:** Feet (grounding), heart (the center of love), the whole body (expansion)
- **Practice time:** Evening, sunset, the time before sleep — the time of natural relaxation and release
- **Supporting practices:** Shavasana, expansion meditations, practices of gratitude and forgiveness
- **Helper stones:** Rose quartz, green aventurine, shungite (for grounding)
- **Connection:** The opposite of BRA-KH-MA (2-5-7, the inhale). PRA-NA is the exhale, BRA-KH-MA is the inhale. Together they make up the full cycle of cosmic breathing
- **State:** Deep peace, expanded consciousness, all-embracing love, dissolved boundaries

3-6-9.essence: **IRIY** is the gift of co-creation with the Creator through absolute trust in the flow of life. Iriy is the ancient Slavic name for the **paradise garden**, where rivers of milk flow and shores are made of honey. The energy of this gift unites **Double Water** at the levels of MA and ZHI with **Aether** at the level of KUN, creating a stream of pure, unclouded creation. A person with this gift is capable of releasing control and allowing the **river of life** to carry them toward the highest design. IRIY teaches that true creativity is born not from effort, but from a state of **deep trust and fluidity**. When personal will is attuned to the will of the Creator, a flow is born in which everything arrives in its proper time and in perfect form. This is the gift of those who can **hear the whisper of the Universe** in the murmur of water and follow it without fear.
3-6-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **IRIY** combines: **MA=ANDRA (Water)**, **ZHI=TUMA (Water)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. Double Water in the foundation creates the most powerful flow of emotional and intuitive energy — the inner spiral of ANDRA winds toward the center, while the outer wave of TUMA spreads this impulse into the world. The Aether of OMA at the level of KUN directs the water stream toward the **highest dimensions**, transforming an ordinary current into a sacred river. The energy moves like a river — softly, but irresistibly, bypassing all obstacles and finding the way even through stones. The 3-6-9 pattern carries a special **harmony of trinity**, where each number is a multiple of three, creating resonance with the fundamental rhythms of the Universe. In the body, this is felt as a warm current from the area of the belly rising up to the heart and further — to the crown.
3-6-9.light_power:
- **Conduit of the flow:** the ability to be a pure channel through which the Creator manifests their designs in the material world, without distorting them through the ego
- **Synchronization with the Universe:** the gift of attuning one's will to the will of the Highest, creating a state of graceful flow where decisions come easily and in time
- **Creative fluidity:** the ability to find unconventional solutions, as water finds a way through stones — without struggle, through softness and adaptability
- **Peacemaking of space:** those around the bearer of IRIY feel a profound stillness and a sense that everything is unfolding rightly
- **Intuitive navigation:** the ability to sense the right direction without logical analysis, trusting the inner current
3-6-9.shadow:
- **Will-lessness and passivity:** trust in the flow becomes an inability to make decisions, an eternal waiting for signs from above, inaction beneath the mask of «I release control». *Correction:* remember that a river has banks — your will is these banks, directing the flow.
- **Emotional flooding:** double Water without control sweeps away all boundaries — the feelings of others overwhelm, one's own state becomes blurred. *Correction:* regularly strengthen personal boundaries through earthly practices and the awareness of «where I am, and where the foreign flow is».
- **Stagnation under the guise of movement:** the energy winds into a whirlpool — the illusion of flow with complete absence of direction, a swamp-like state. *Correction:* periodically ask yourself a concrete question: «Where am I sailing?» — and direct the current consciously.
- **Dissolution of identity:** complete loss of self in the flow, when a person ceases to understand where their desires are and where the current of circumstances is. *Correction:* alternate IRIY practices with practices of earthly gifts, returning to the body and to concrete actions.
3-6-9.activation:
1. **Find your river.** Sit by water — a stream, a river, a fountain — or turn on the sound of flowing water. Close your eyes and tune in to the sound of the current. Feel how within you awakens an answering flow — from the area of the belly, warm and calm.
2. **Release control.** Choose one specific situation in life where you are accustomed to controlling everything. Mentally place it on the surface of the river and watch as the flow picks it up. Speak: «I trust the flow of life».
3. **Enter co-creation.** Imagine the Creator standing beside you at the river. You are not swimming alone — you are swimming together. Feel this support and safety within the flow.
4. **Anchor in the body.** Place your palms on your belly and breathe slowly, imagining how with each inhale the river within you becomes wider and calmer. Complete the practice by drinking a sip of pure water with gratitude.
3-6-9.meditation: **Meditation «The Sacred River».** Sit comfortably and imagine yourself standing on the bank of a wide luminous river — this is the river of life itself, carrying within it all possibilities and all the designs of the Creator. The water in it shimmers with turquoise and silver light, and you feel that it is alive, warm, inviting. Slowly enter the water and allow the current to carry you — do not resist, do not try to swim, simply trust. Feel how the river carries you precisely where you need to go, and each cell of your body fills with the light of co-creation. The banks of the river are your values and intentions, they direct the flow but do not restrain it. Remain in this state for 15-20 minutes, allowing images to come and go freely, like waves. Complete the meditation by mentally thanking the river and feeling the support beneath your feet.
3-6-9.application:
- **Creative blocks:** when control and planning have reached a dead end, IRIY returns fluidity to thinking and opens unconventional solutions through trust in intuition
- **Relationships:** the gift helps to release expectations and accept a partner in their own flow, creating space for natural closeness
- **Business and projects:** IRIY suggests when it is necessary to stop pushing and begin attracting — instead of effort, to use the state of flow to draw the needed people and resources
- **Decision-making:** before an important choice, enter the state of flow through meditation and await the clarity that will come on its own — without violence to yourself
- **Healing:** the water energy of IRIY gently dissolves emotional blocks and stagnations, restoring the natural flow of vital force in the body
3-6-9.safety:
- **A river without banks is a flood.** Preserve grounding when working with IRIY, so that the water element does not carry you too far from reality. Alternate flow practices with earthly actions — physical labor, walks, work with the hands.
- **Trust is not irresponsibility.** Do not confuse trust in the flow with refusal of action. The river flows, but it has a riverbed. Your riverbed is your values, commitments, and conscious intentions.
- **Caution in emotional instability.** People in states of depression or strong stress are advised to begin with short IRIY practices and to be sure to complete them with grounding through contact with the body and the physical world.
3-6-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Water + Water + Aether (double Water, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** A luminous river flowing through a paradise garden; a spiral of water rising toward the sky
- **Color:** Turquoise, silver-Light blue, pearlescent
- **Helper stones:** Aquamarine, moonstone, larimar
- **State:** Trust, fluidity, co-creation, peacefulness, dissolution in the flow

5-4-9.essence: **MI-RA** is the gift of connection between worlds, the central axis of the entire system of **64 gifts**. MI-RA unites the solar principle **RA** and the vibration **MI**, creating a bridge between the visible and the invisible, between matter and spirit. Like the **World Tree**, whose roots go into the depths of the earth and whose crown touches the stars, this gift connects all levels of being into a single living whole. **Double Fire** at MA and ZHI creates the most powerful vertical pillar of energy, permeating all dimensions. A person with this gift carries within themselves the potential to **unite all opposites** — light and shadow, above and below, beginning and end. MI-RA is the heartbeat of the Universe, setting the rhythm for all existence.
5-4-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **MI-RA** combines: **MA=LUBA (Fire)**, **ZHI=ZINGRA (Fire)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. Double Fire creates the most powerful **vertical pillar of energy**, like the trunk of the world tree, permeating all levels of existence. LUBA is external fire, radiating light in all directions, while ZINGRA is internal fire, spiral, rising from the depths. The Aether of OMA transforms this fiery pillar into the **axis of the universe** — a channel of connection between all worlds and dimensions. The 5-4-9 pattern contains the golden ratio of energies: 5 (fire of creation) and 4 (fire of transformation) give birth to 9 (aetheric synthesis). This is the only gift that **resonates simultaneously with all 64 positions** of the matrix, being its living heart.
5-4-9.light_power:
- **Vision of unity:** the ability to see connections between all phenomena and find a common root in the most diverse things — people, ideas, traditions
- **Bridge between worlds:** the gift of being a living conductor between realities, helping other people to connect scattered parts of their lives into a whole
- **Awakening gifts in others:** near the bearer of MI-RA, those around begin to recognize their own gifts and purpose, as if the light of the Tree illuminates each one
- **Architectural vision of reality:** understanding of how the very fabric of being is arranged, the ability to see structure behind chaos and design behind chance
- **Integration of opposites:** the rare capacity to be a center without being a centrist — to unite without subjugating, to connect without binding
5-4-9.shadow:
- **Messianic complex:** the feeling of being the only bridge between worlds, without which everything will collapse, megalomania, and the need for grandeur. *Correction:* remember that the Tree of worlds is not you personally, but the flow that passes through you. You are a conductor, not a source.
- **Blinding brightness:** double Fire in shadow burns everything around — a person becomes destructively bright, leaving no space for others. *Correction:* learn to shine softly, like a candle, not like a spotlight. The true sun warms, not incinerates.
- **Inability to be ordinary:** a constant need for significance and exclusivity, rejection of simple, everyday matters. *Correction:* practice conscious ordinariness — wash the dishes, walk, breathe — finding greatness in simplicity.
- **Energetic depletion of the roots:** all energy goes into the crown (spirituality), while the roots (body, matter) dry out. *Correction:* mandatory grounding through the body, food, contact with the earth.
5-4-9.activation:
1. **Stand as the Tree.** Stand straight, feet shoulder-width apart. Imagine that your spine is the trunk of the world tree. From your feet downward, powerful roots descend; from your crown upward, radiant branches rise. Feel yourself as the axis between heaven and earth.
2. **Ignite the double Fire.** Inhale and direct attention to the area of the solar plexus. Imagine how from the core of the Earth rises a fiery stream (ZINGRA), and from the sky descends a radiant light (LUBA). The two fires meet in your heart.
3. **Open the branches.** From the point of meeting in the heart, imagine luminous branches radiating — to each of the 64 gifts, to every being, to every world. You are the center through which all are connected.
4. **Accept your role humbly.** Speak: «I am a bridge, not a shore. I am a conductor, not a source». Feel how these words free you from the burden of exclusivity and fill you with the joy of service.
5-4-9.meditation: **Meditation «The Tree of Worlds».** Stand straight and close your eyes. Feel how your spine becomes a living trunk — warm, pulsating, connecting the depth of the earth with the infinity of the sky. From your feet, roots grow, descending to the molten core of the planet, and from your crown rises a canopy, touching the stars. Along the trunk-spine simultaneously rises the fiery energy of Earth and descends the aetheric light of Heaven. At the point of the heart, these flows meet, forming a **shining golden sphere**. From this sphere, in all directions, branches radiate — living threads of connection with all that exists. Feel the pulsation of life through the entire Tree — each heartbeat echoes in all worlds. Remain in this state for 20-30 minutes, sensing yourself as the axis of the universe — not in pride, but in humility before the greatness of this connection.
5-4-9.application:
- **Integration of life:** MI-RA is applied when you feel a rupture between parts of your life — work and family, spirituality and matter, dreams and reality
- **Negotiation and mediation:** the gift helps to find the point where the interests of all sides converge, to be a bridge between conflicting positions
- **Deep healing:** work with the root causes of problems, not symptoms — MI-RA sees the entire chain from source to manifestation
- **Creativity of the highest order:** the ability to create works that speak at all levels simultaneously — to body, soul, and spirit
- **Mentorship:** helping other people to unfold their own gifts through creating a field in which each one sees their place in the larger picture
5-4-9.safety:
- **The central gift requires maturity.** MI-RA is the most powerful gift of the system. It is recommended to work through several other gifts before entering deeply into its energy. At the appearance of messianic experiences, immediately ground yourself.
- **Double Fire overheats.** Watch the state of the body — headaches, insomnia, agitation without cause — are signals of overheating. Balance with the water practices of IRIY and earthly grounding.
- **Do not force the connection.** The Tree grows slowly. An attempt to forcefully open all branches at once may lead to energetic depletion. Allow connections to form naturally.
5-4-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire + Fire + Aether (double Fire, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** The World Tree with a fiery trunk; the golden vertical axis with radiating beams
- **Color:** Golden, White with golden radiance, purple
- **Helper stones:** Citrine, sunstone, pyrite
- **State:** Connectedness, centeredness, integration, the sense of being the axis of the universe

1-8-9.essence: **RAI** is the gift of creating paradise here and now through **conscious choice**. Not paradise as a reward after death, but paradise as a state created right in this moment by the power of presence and intention. **Double Earth** at the levels of MA and ZHI forms the strongest foundation for materializing the highest states of consciousness. The Aether OMA at KUN transforms dense earthly energy into a **space of bliss and spiritual abundance**. This is the path of **siddhis** — supernatural abilities, which manifest not through flight from matter, but through full presence in the body and in the world. RAI teaches that perfection is not a goal, but a **choice** that can be made in any moment. Being the opposite of the gift **ROY**, RAI shows: abundance begins with the inner state, not with external circumstances.
1-8-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **RAI** combines: **MA=LOGOS (Earth)**, **ZHI=BITRA (Earth)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. Double Earth creates incredible **density and stability** of the energetic structure — like a mountain that has stood for millennia. The 1-8 pattern embraces the entire spectrum of the earthly octave — from the initial impulse of LOGOS to the completed form of BITRA. The Aether OMA spiritualizes this density, transforming matter into a **temple**. The energy moves slowly but steadily, like the growth of a crystal — each step is conscious and irreversible. This is the energy of a master who knows that paradise is not a place, but a **state of consciousness**, and creates it with their own hands in every moment.
1-8-9.light_power:
- **Creation of paradise on Earth:** the ability to transform any space and any situation into a state of harmony, beauty, and bliss through conscious choices
- **Path of siddhis:** supernatural abilities unfold as a natural consequence of full presence — when you are completely here, matter begins to respond to intention
- **Spiritual abundance:** the feeling of fullness and sufficiency, not dependent on external circumstances — an inner paradise that cannot be taken away
- **Completion of reality:** the ability to see perfection in the imperfect and to help reality unfold its highest potential
- **The light of presence:** near the bearer of RAI, the world becomes brighter, more meaningful, and more beautiful — their very presence transforms space
1-8-9.shadow:
- **Perfectionism:** the impossibility of accepting reality as it is, eternal dissatisfaction — «here it is not paradisiacal enough, there it is not perfect enough». *Correction:* remember that paradise is not ideal conditions, but the ability to see perfection in what already is.
- **Petrification:** double Earth in shadow is heaviness, immobility, inability to change, fear of losing what has been achieved. *Correction:* regularly bring an element of the new into your life, do not cling to forms, allow paradise to renew itself.
- **Spiritual materialism:** attempting to build paradise with money, collecting spiritual practices without depth, chasing siddhis as trophies. *Correction:* return to simplicity — paradise begins with one conscious breath, not with a list of achievements.
1-8-9.activation:
1. **Conscious choice.** Right now, stop and make the decision: «This moment is perfect». Not because there are no problems in it, but because you choose to see its fullness. Feel how this choice changes the quality of presence.
2. **Grounding in the body.** Stand barefoot on the earth or on the floor. Feel the support — firm, reliable, sustaining. Direct attention to the feet and imagine how mighty roots descend from them into the depths of the Earth. Double Earth is your foundation.
3. **Filling with Aether.** Through the crown, admit a stream of aetheric light — it gently descends through the body and meets the earthly force in the area of the heart. At this point is born the space of paradise — dense, but luminous.
4. **The practice of gratitude.** Name aloud five concrete things in this moment for which you are grateful. Each gratitude is a brick of your paradise. Feel how the space around you responds to these words.
1-8-9.meditation: **Meditation «Paradise Here and Now».** Sit on the earth or on the floor, feel the support beneath you — firm, reliable, ancient. Close your eyes and begin to notice all that makes this moment perfect — the warmth of the body, the rhythm of breath, sounds, scents, the sensation of fabric on the skin. With each inhale, intensify the feeling of fullness of this moment. Imagine that from your feet mighty crystalline roots descend into the earth, and through the crown enters aetheric light. Where the roots and the light meet — in your body — is born the space of paradise, shining with Emerald and Golden light. Allow this space to expand with each breath, encompassing the room, the home, the entire world around. You do not seek paradise — you **are** paradise, right here, right now.
1-8-9.application:
- **Arrangement of space:** RAI is ideally suited for the conscious creation of a home, garden, workspace — any space that must become a place of power and beauty
- **Development of siddhis:** practice full presence in everyday actions — washing dishes, walking, breathing — and observe how reality begins to respond to your intention
- **Relationships:** the gift helps to create moments of deep closeness and beauty with loved ones, transforming an ordinary evening into a sacred event
- **Overcoming crisis:** in difficult moments, RAI returns to the point of power — to the conscious choice to see possibility, not problem
- **Materialization of intentions:** double Earth gives the ability to embody spiritual insights into concrete, tangible forms
1-8-9.safety:
- **Do not confuse perfection with idealism.** Paradise is not the absence of difficulties, but the ability to be at peace with what is. If the striving for paradise gives rise to suffering from the imperfection of the world — this is a signal of shadow.
- **Double Earth weighs down.** If you feel heaviness, getting stuck, the impossibility of moving — balance with airy and water practices. RAI and ROY are not the only gifts, breathe.
- **Siddhis are not a goal, but a consequence.** Do not chase supernatural abilities — they come as a side effect of deep presence. The desire to possess them is a sure way to push them away.
1-8-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth + Earth + Aether (double Earth, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** A crystalline garden; a radiant emerald in the earth; a flowering tree on a mountain
- **Color:** Emerald, Golden-green, White with green radiance
- **Helper stones:** Emerald, green tourmaline, peridot
- **State:** Conscious fullness, bliss, deep presence, the feeling of «I am home»

8-1-9.essence: **ROY** is the gift of the living algorithm, the understanding and creation of **matrices, systems, and hierarchies**, through which **material abundance** enters the world. Like the wisdom of a bee swarm, where each element knows its place and together they create something greater than the sum of the parts, this gift opens the laws of collective creation. **Double Earth** at MA and ZHI forms the energy of structure and order, while the Aether OMA animates these systems, making them **living and self-organizing**. ROY is the gift of money, resources, and the material flow as a living energy of exchange. Being the opposite of **RAI**, ROY shows: structure and system are not enemies of spirituality, but its instruments in the material world. When an algorithm is spiritualized, it creates abundance for all.
8-1-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **ROY** combines: **MA=BITRA (Earth)**, **ZHI=LOGOS (Earth)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. The 8-1 pattern is the mirror reflection of RAI (1-8): if RAI goes from the one to the eight (from simple to complex), then ROY begins with **maximum complexity** and orders it, creating a system. Double Earth here works as an architect — BITRA forms the outer contour of the system, while LOGOS sets its inner logic and hierarchy. The Aether OMA animates this construction, transforming a dead mechanism into a **living organism**. The energy of ROY resembles a fractal pattern — the same principle repeats at all scales, from cell to corporation.
8-1-9.light_power:
- **Systemic vision:** the brilliant ability to see hidden algorithms of success and to build organizations, businesses, and communities as living organisms
- **Attraction of resources:** money and resources flow to the bearer of ROY, because they understand their nature as the energy of exchange and create the right channels
- **Creation of living hierarchies:** the ability to build structures based on natural order, where each is in their own place and realizes their potential
- **Multiplication through giving:** ROY in light is abundance that grows when shared, like honey, which becomes more when the hive is healthy
- **Materialization of ideas:** the ability to transform abstract ideas into working systems with concrete, measurable results
8-1-9.shadow:
- **Tyranny of the system:** hierarchy turns into an instrument of suppression, people become cogs, the living algorithm — a dead machine. *Correction:* regularly check — does the system serve the people, or do the people serve the system? A living swarm is freedom within order.
- **Obsession with money:** hoarding, greed, inability to share — the energy of exchange stagnates and turns into a swamp. *Correction:* practice conscious generosity, remembering that money is a flow, not a dam.
- **Reduction of the living to schemas:** the attempt to fit everything — people, feelings, relationships — into tables and algorithms, killing spontaneity. *Correction:* leave space for chaos and unpredictability in every system — precisely there is the new born.
- **Shadow swarm — a swarm of locusts:** a system that devours everything in its path without creation, parasitizing on resources. *Correction:* every system must create more than it consumes — this is the law of a healthy swarm.
8-1-9.activation:
1. **See the algorithms.** Begin to notice patterns and systems around you — in nature (anthill, beehive, flock of birds), in society (flows of people, money, information). Each pattern is a hint from ROY.
2. **Bring order.** Choose one area of life and create a system in it — a budget, archive, schedule. Feel how order gives birth to energy, how structure releases the force that previously was spent on chaos.
3. **Animate the system.** Look at the created structure and ask: «Is it living? Does it breathe? Is there a place for growth and change in it?» Add an element of flexibility — a living algorithm adapts.
4. **Launch the flow of exchange.** Make a conscious act of generosity — give something valuable (money, time, knowledge) with the intention of launching the energy of exchange. Speak: «I am part of the living swarm, and my contribution multiplies».
8-1-9.meditation: **Meditation «The Golden Hive».** Sit comfortably and imagine yourself at the center of a huge luminous hive. You are the heart of the system, and around you, in perfect order, move thousands of golden luminous points — each point is an element of your life: resources, connections, possibilities, skills, people. Observe how they self-organize into a perfect structure, where each element finds its ideal place. Not one is excess, not one is lost. Feel how from this order is born honey — Golden, warm energy of abundance, filling every cell. With each exhale, generously give a part of this honey to the world, knowing: the more you give, the more the swarm produces. Remain in this state for 15-20 minutes, sensing yourself as part of a great living system.
8-1-9.application:
- **Business and finance:** ROY is indispensable in creating and optimizing business systems, organizational structures, financial strategies, and sources of passive income
- **Resource management:** the gift helps to bring order to finances, create a budget as a living system, understand where the energy of money is leaking and how to redirect it
- **Building a team:** the ability to see who in which place will best unfold themselves, and to create structures where each participant strengthens the whole
- **Daily life and space:** ROY helps to organize the home, workspace, and daily processes so that they work for you, not you for them
- **Relationship with money:** transformation of the perception of money from a dead resource into a living energy of exchange, which loves movement and gratitude
8-1-9.safety:
- **The system serves life, not the other way around.** If the people around you turn into functions, and relationships into transactions, this is a signal of the shadow side of ROY. Regularly ask yourself: «Whom does this system serve?»
- **Balance of accumulation and giving.** Money and resources are a flow. Accumulation without giving leads to the shadow. After each receiving — conscious giving. After each giving — grateful receiving.
- **Do not lose fluidity.** If you feel that the system has become rigid and cumbersome, turn to the practices of IRIY for restoring fluidity and flexibility within the structure.
8-1-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Earth + Earth + Aether (double Earth, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** Golden combs; a hive luminous from within; a fractal lattice
- **Color:** Golden, honey, dark-brown with golden cast
- **Helper stones:** Tiger's eye, pyrite, amber
- **State:** Systemic clarity, the feeling of order, abundance, the sense of «everything in its place»

7-2-9.essence: **TO-RA** is the gift of the wind of change, of the **riddle** and the launching of new cycles of being. In the name of this gift sound both the **sacred law** (Torah) and the solar principle (**RA**), united in the wind that sweeps away the outlived and brings the fresh, the unexplored. **Double Air** at MA and ZHI creates a powerful vortex movement of thought and information, while the Aether OMA gives this movement higher meaning and direction. The person with this gift is a **messenger of change**, the one who arrives at the crossroads of epochs. The energy of the riddle is that which moves knowledge forward, the eternal question that is more important than any answer. TO-RA teaches that renewal is not destruction, but the **breath of the world**: the old cycle is exhaled, the new is inhaled.
7-2-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **TO-RA** combines: **MA=ASTRA (Air)**, **ZHI=NIMA (Air)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. Double Air creates **vortex energy**, similar to a tornado — swift, mighty, transforming. ASTRA is external air, the rhythm of inhalation-exhalation, the breath of change. NIMA is internal air, rays from the center, spreading new ideas in all directions. The Aether OMA gives this vortex a **vertical dimension** — the wind blows not only horizontally, but between worlds. The 7-2 pattern carries within itself the polarity of the mystical seven and the paired two, creating tension between mystery and manifestation. The energy of TO-RA comes in waves, each one stronger than the previous — this is the energy of pivotal moments.
7-2-9.light_power:
- **Catalyst of change:** the ability to sense moments when a system is ready for transformation, and to launch the process of renewal gently, precisely, in time
- **Power of the question:** the gift of asking questions that overturn worldview and open new horizons — one right question is worth a thousand answers
- **Fresh perspective:** near the bearer of TO-RA, people begin to see possibilities where before they saw walls, and prospects where there was a dead end
- **Launching of new cycles:** the ability to consciously complete the outlived and begin the new — with clarity, energy, and anticipation
- **Transmission of knowledge:** TO-RA as sacred law — the skill of clothing truth in a form that is transmitted from generation to generation
7-2-9.shadow:
- **Destructive hurricane:** the wind of change sweeps away everything indiscriminately — the old, the new, and the valuable. Change for the sake of change, without direction or meaning. *Correction:* before each change, ask: «What am I building?» — not only «What am I destroying?»
- **Idle talk:** double Air in shadow is chatter, informational noise, words without actions, endless conversations about change without the changes themselves. *Correction:* introduce the rule — back every word with one concrete action.
- **Restlessness:** an eternal search for the new, an inability to be constant, a fear of staying somewhere too long. *Correction:* learn to value what has already been built, find newness in depth, not in breadth.
- **Manipulation through mystery:** the riddle becomes an instrument of control — understatement, mysteriousness as a mask. *Correction:* remember that a true riddle opens, not hides.
7-2-9.activation:
1. **Feel the wind.** Go out to an open space where the wind blows. Spread your arms and allow the wind to blow through you — let it carry away all that has stagnated. If there is no wind — breathe intensely, creating your own inner vortex.
2. **Ask the great question.** Formulate one deep question to which you have no answer. Do not seek the answer — simply hold the question within, like a seed planted in the earth. The riddle of TO-RA feeds on the unknown.
3. **Complete the old cycle.** Choose one thing in life that has been completed, but you still hold on to it. Mentally or literally release it to the wind — burn a note, exhale with intention, say «thank you and farewell».
4. **Sow the new.** Take one action launching a new cycle — sign up for a course, begin a new project, write the first word of a future book. The wind of change is already blowing — ride it.
7-2-9.meditation: **Meditation «Crossroads of Winds».** Stand or sit in an open place — real or imagined. Imagine yourself atop a mountain where the winds from all sides of the world converge. Spread your arms and open yourself to the stream of air. With the first wind — from the east — comes to you a **riddle**: a question that has long awaited its hour. Accept it. With the second wind — from the west — leaves the **old cycle**: all that has outlived itself is carried away. Release it. With the third wind — from the south — comes the **fire of a new beginning**: warm, alive, full of energy. Accept it. With the fourth wind — from the north — comes the **silence of wisdom**: the understanding that you stand at the crossroads, and all paths are open. Remain at this point of absolute freedom and readiness for the new.
7-2-9.application:
- **Moments of transition:** TO-RA is applied at the change of work, relocation, the beginning of a new stage of life — everywhere a fresh wind of change is needed and courage to step into the unknown
- **Intellectual breakthroughs:** the gift helps to find breakthrough ideas and unconventional solutions, destroying patterns of thinking by the power of the right question
- **Communication:** the ability to formulate questions and messages that change the listener's perspective and open new dimensions of understanding
- **Overcoming stagnation:** when life has stagnated and fresh air is needed — TO-RA ventilates any space, from mind to home
- **Rituals of transition:** conducting ceremonies of completion and beginning — closing projects, parting with the past, blessing the new path
7-2-9.safety:
- **Wind without roots is a storm.** Double Air can create detachment from reality — be sure to balance with earthly practices. Walk barefoot, work with your hands, eat dense food.
- **Do not break what works.** Do not launch new cycles until you have completed the previous ones. The wind of change is not a hurricane of destruction, but a fresh breeze of renewal.
- **The riddle must lead to light.** If your mystery frightens or confuses those around — this is a signal of shadow. A true riddle inspires the search, does not drive into a dead end.
7-2-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Air + Air + Aether (double Air, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** A vortex; a crossroads of winds; an open scroll, whose pages are turned by the wind
- **Color:** Silver-White, lavender, Light blue with silver cast
- **Helper stones:** Labradorite, fluorite, celestite
- **State:** Freshness, anticipation of the new, clarity at the crossroads, the feeling of «wind in the sails»

2-7-9.essence: **FA-NA** is the gift of the **sacred moment**, of pure presence «here and now», complete dissolution in the current instant. In the Sufi tradition, fana means **dissolution of the ego in the divine** — a state when the drop realizes itself as the ocean. **Double Air** at MA and ZHI creates a space of absolute clarity and transparency, while the Aether OMA fills this space with **sacred meaning**. This gift teaches that eternity is contained in every moment, and there is no need to seek it elsewhere. Being the opposite of **TO-RA**, FA-NA shows: the deepest changes are born not from action, but from full, absolute presence. When you are truly **here**, the whole world stops — and in this pause opens the door to eternity.
2-7-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **FA-NA** combines: **MA=NIMA (Air)**, **ZHI=ASTRA (Air)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. The 2-7 pattern is the mirror reflection of TO-RA (7-2): if TO-RA is the wind carrying into the future, then FA-NA is **complete stillness**, absolute silence in which the voice of eternity is heard. Double Air here does not move but becomes **space** — infinite, transparent, holding all. NIMA is the rays of awareness, radiating from the center; ASTRA is breath that slows to a complete pause. The Aether OMA transforms this space into a **portal to eternity**. The energy of FA-NA is the energy of the pause between inhalation and exhalation, the instant between the ticks of the clock. This is the most subtle and transparent energy among all 64 gifts.
2-7-9.light_power:
- **Absolute presence:** the rarest quality, when a person dwells entirely in the moment without a single thought of past or future — and in this presence eternity is revealed
- **Transmission of peace:** the bearer of FA-NA radiates the deepest peace, which is instantly transmitted to those around — near them, people slow down and begin to breathe
- **Point of power:** the sacred moment is the point from which all is possible, because only in the present exists the real force of creation
- **Mystical unity:** FA-NA opens the experience of the dissolution of boundaries between oneself and the world — not loss of self, but acquisition of all
- **Clarity without effort:** in the state of full presence, answers to any questions come on their own — not through thinking, but through being
2-7-9.shadow:
- **Dissociation:** disconnection from reality under the mask of «spiritual presence» — a person goes into trance states, losing contact with the body and the world. *Correction:* check yourself with simple questions: «Do I feel my body? Do I remember what day today is?» Presence includes the body, does not exclude it.
- **Spiritual escapism:** flight from problems into meditation and «sacred silence» when life demands action. *Correction:* remember that FA-NA is presence in life, not flight from it. After each practice of silence — one concrete action.
- **Loss of identity:** dissolution of the ego without return — a person ceases to understand who they are, what they want, where they are going. *Correction:* alternate FA-NA practices with earthly active actions, regularly returning to the question «Who am I in this world?»
- **Emptiness without meaning:** instead of filled silence — a feeling of meaninglessness and indifference to everything. *Correction:* return to simple joys — food, a walk, an embrace — and find the sacred moment in them.
2-7-9.activation:
1. **Stop.** Right now, stop. Stop the body, the thoughts, the intentions. Simply freeze. Notice how the world continues to exist without your participation — and that is beautiful.
2. **The pause between breaths.** Take a slow inhale, then a slow exhale. And hold the breath — not forcibly, but softly, like a pause in music. In this pause lives FA-NA. Stay in it as long as is comfortable.
3. **Dissolution in the moment.** Open all the senses: what do you hear? See? Feel with the skin? Do not name, do not evaluate — simply perceive. Allow yourself to become pure perception without a perceiver.
4. **Return.** Gently return the sensation of your body, your name, your affairs. But preserve within that sacred moment of silence — it is now always with you, like a quiet background behind any action.
2-7-9.meditation: **Meditation «Eternity in the Moment».** Sit in silence and close your eyes. Do nothing — do not visualize, do not repeat mantras, do not follow the breath. Simply **be**. Allow all thoughts, images, and sensations to appear and disappear, like clouds in an endless sky. You are not the clouds. You are the sky. Gradually, the space between thoughts will begin to expand, and in this space you will discover a silence that was always here — before you, around you, within you. This silence is the sacred moment, the point of eternity in the stream of time. There is no need to achieve anything — you are already **there**, where you need to be. There is no need to become someone — you are already **the one** who you are. Remain in this state as long as you wish, knowing that each moment of silence fills you more than years of bustle.
2-7-9.application:
- **Anti-stress:** in any stressful situation, FA-NA instantly returns centeredness — one pause between breaths is enough to return to yourself
- **Decision-making:** before an important choice, enter the sacred moment — the answer will come on its own from the silence, clear and unconditional
- **Deep creativity:** the deepest works are born from the state of full presence, when creator and creation become one
- **Closeness in relationships:** the practice of full presence with another person creates incredible depth of connection — to be truly near is more precious than any words
- **Daily hygiene of consciousness:** use FA-NA as a daily practice — several minutes of silence in the morning and evening cleanse the mind of informational noise
2-7-9.safety:
- **Presence is not flight.** If the practice of silence leads to detachment from life and responsibilities — this is a signal of the shadow side. After each deep practice of FA-NA, do something concrete and earthly.
- **Caution with the tendency toward dissociation.** People who easily «fly out» of the body are advised to begin with short sessions and be sure to complete them with grounding — contact with the floor, sensation of the body, several active movements.
- **Do not confuse silence with emptiness.** The sacred moment of FA-NA is filled with life, not deprived of it. If silence is felt as indifference and apathy — this is not FA-NA, but its shadow. Return to simple joys.
2-7-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Air + Air + Aether (double Air, spiritualized by Aether)
- **Symbol:** An endless sky without a single cloud; a pause between heartbeats; a drop dissolving in the ocean
- **Color:** Transparent White, pale Light blue, pearly
- **Helper stones:** Rock crystal, selenite, pearl
- **State:** Sacred silence, dissolution in the moment, eternity here and now, absolute peace

4-5-9.essence: **SHI-VA** is the gift of the observer-creator playing the great game of **cosmic transformation**. Like the dancing Shiva, whose Tandava dance simultaneously **destroys and creates** worlds, this gift opens access to the very essence of change — where destruction and creation are inseparable. **Double Fire** on MA and ZHI generates the most intense energy of transformation, while the Aether of OMA turns this energy into a **conscious cosmic dance**. A bearer of this gift can hold the position of observer and creator at the same time, playing with reality the way a musician plays with a melody. Transformation in SHI-VA is not heavy labor but a **joyful dance of fire**, where every movement destroys the obsolete and simultaneously creates the new. This is the gift of those who know: life is not a path to a destination but **the dance itself**.
4-5-9.energy_pattern: The energetic formula of **SHI-VA** unites: **MA=ZINGRA (Fire)**, **ZHI=LUBA (Fire)**, **KUN=OMA (Aether)**. Double Fire creates an energetic field like **plasma** — the fourth state of matter, transcending solid, liquid and gas. ZINGRA is the inner fire, spiral, transforming, rising from the depths. LUBA is the outer fire, radiating, illuminating, opening. The Aether of OMA grants this fire **awareness** — it is no elemental blaze but a dance of flame, each motion of which is an act of creation. The 4-5 pattern stands at the very center of the fiery octave, forming a point of **maximum transformational power**. The energy of SHI-VA pulses rhythmically: creation — preservation — destruction — pause — and creation again.
4-5-9.light_power:
- **Dancing transformation:** an incredible capacity to transform reality through a state of play and joy, without heaviness or drama
- **Double sight:** the simultaneous ability to observe events from a bird's-eye view and to actively participate in the dance of life — the rarest union of a sage's detachment and a creator's passion
- **Lightness in letting go:** an effortless capacity to part with the old, knowing on a cellular level that destruction is the beginning of new creation
- **Contagious courage:** beside SHI-VA, others find the courage to transform, because they see that change can be not frightening but dance-like
- **Alchemy of fire:** the ability to turn any crisis into fuel for new creation, using the energy of destruction as a source of building
4-5-9.shadow:
- **Destroyer without creator:** delight in destruction for its own sake, forgetting the creative half of the dance. *Correction:* before every "tearing down" ask, "What will I build in its place?" — and do not begin until there is an answer.
- **Cold detachment:** the observer's stance hardens into cynicism and indifference to another's pain — "I am only observing while they suffer." *Correction:* remember that a true observer-creator is not indifferent — they have compassion while remaining centered.
- **Adrenaline dependence:** a need for constant drama and transformation, an inability to rest in calm and stability. *Correction:* learn to find the dance in silence, fire in stillness, transformation in the unchanging.
- **Manipulative play:** treating people as pieces, without respect for their feelings and freedom. *Correction:* the dance of SHI-VA is a dance with life, not over people. Every dance partner is worthy of respect.
4-5-9.activation:
1. **Begin the dance.** Put on music — anything that calls your body to move. Start dancing, letting the body express whatever wants out — joy, anger, sorrow, ecstasy. Do not control — let the fire move you.
2. **Split into two.** While dancing, begin to observe yourself from outside. One part of you dances — fully, passionately, without looking back. The other watches calmly, seeing every movement. Both parts are you.
3. **Release into fire.** Imagine a bonfire of transformation before you. Mentally throw into it what has had its time — a habit, a belief, a fear. Watch how the fire turns it into sparks of the new.
4. **Unite observer and dancer.** Stop and feel how the two parts — the one who acts and the one who watches — merge into one whole. This is SHI-VA: the unity of stillness and motion, destruction and creation.
4-5-9.meditation: **Meditation "Cosmic Dance."** Stand and begin to sway slowly from side to side, like a candle flame in the wind. With each movement your dance grows freer, and you feel the fire of transformation passing through every cell. Now split into two: the dancer is fully immersed in motion, the observer sees the dance from an infinite space of silence. Let the dance show you what in your life is ready for transformation — and with joy and gratitude release the old into the fire, knowing that a new flame will be born from every spark. Feel the rhythm of the cosmic dance: creation — preservation — destruction — pause — and creation again. You are this rhythm. End the meditation by uniting observer and dancer into one breathing whole, and smile — for it is only a dance.
4-5-9.application:
- **Crises and transformations:** SHI-VA is indispensable in moments of profound change — personal crises, business reorganization, life turning points — turning heaviness into a dance
- **Overcoming fear of change:** when fear paralyzes, switch on SHI-VA — start moving, dancing, playing, and fear dissolves in the fire of motion
- **Radical creativity:** the gift opens access to forms of expression born at the edge of destruction and creation — the most daring art
- **Conflicts:** the observer-creator stance lets you avoid emotional entanglement, preserving the ability to act and to see a way out where others see a dead end
- **Energy renewal:** when you feel stagnation or burnout, SHI-VA returns the fire of life through movement, play, and conscious destruction of routine
4-5-9.safety:
- **Double Fire demands respect.** This is the most intense energy — watch the state of your body. Headaches, insomnia, excessive arousal are signs of overheating. Cool down with the water practices of IRIY.
- **Destruction is not an end in itself.** If you notice that you take pleasure in others' suffering during change — this is a signal of the shadow side that requires an immediate halt and self-inquiry.
- **Play is not irresponsibility.** The dance of life includes care for consequences. Every movement of the dance affects others — dance with respect for your partners' space.
4-5-9.attributes:
- **Elements:** Fire + Fire + Aether (double Fire, ensouled by Aether)
- **Symbol:** A dancing flame; Nataraja (the dancing Shiva) within a ring of fire; a spiral turning in two directions at once
- **Color:** Fiery orange, scarlet, blue-violet flame
- **Helping stones:** Garnet, ruby, fire agate
- **State:** Dancing awareness, playful transformation, unity of stillness and motion, joy of change

6-2-8.essence: **BI-MA** is the gift of inner delight in life through awakened perception of beauty in all that exists. When the eyes of the soul are open, every moment becomes a **dance of form, light and sound**, and even the ordinary takes on the features of a work of art. The watery nature of the MA field grants its bearer **flowing sensuality**, the ability to dissolve into sensations and absorb the subtlest shades of beauty. The airy field of ZHI adds a **lightness of rapture** — the experience rises above the body, becoming an almost unearthly aesthetic ecstasy. The earthy field of KUN returns this ecstasy back into the flesh, allowing **pleasure to become bodily**, tangible, real.
